AI.result: 在真实研究主题上的实验表明，EvoSci 在基于 LLM 的结构化同行评审和对比排名评估中显著优于强基线方法，取得了最高的整体同行评审得分（ICLR 4.90）和最佳排名表现（Top-10 = 54）。
AI.conclusion: EvoSci 在科学想法生成和持续发现方面展现了优越性，表明结合进化启发与多智能体协作机制能够有效提升科学探索的连贯性和创造力。

title: LLM-as-a-Reviewer: Benchmarking Their Ability, Divergence, and Prompt Injection Resistance as Paper Reviewers
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used in academic peer review, yet their reliability, alignment with human judgment, and robustness to adversarial attacks remain poorly understood. We present a systematic benchmark of LLM-as-a-Reviewer on 898 papers stratified from NeurIPS and ICLR, evaluating 12 LLMs along three axes: rating calibration, divergence from human reviewers, and resistance to prompt injection embedded via an invisible font-mapping attack. We find that LLMs systematically overrate weaker submissions and diverge from humans in topical emphasis, under-flagging Clarity and over-flagging Reproducibility, while producing reviews two to three times longer with lower lexical diversity and a more standardized vocabulary. Prompt injection remains highly effective. Simple hidden instructions can promote low-scoring papers to acceptance-level ratings in a substantial fraction of cases, with effectiveness varying sharply across model families. While LLMs offer utility in structuring evaluations, their integration into peer review requires safeguards against both intrinsic biases and adversarial risks.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评测了12种大语言模型作为学术同行评审者的表现，发现LLM倾向于高估弱投稿、与人类评审在主题关注点上存在分歧、生成更长但词汇多样性更低的评审文本，且对通过不可见字体映射的提示注入攻击高度脆弱。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在学术同行评审中的应用日益广泛，但其可靠性、与人类判断的一致性以及对对抗性攻击的鲁棒性尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个LLM-as-a-Reviewer系统基准测试，基于来自NeurIPS和ICLR的898篇分层抽样论文，评估了12种LLM在三个维度上的表现：评分校准、与人类评审者的偏差，以及通过不可见字体映射攻击注入隐式提示的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.result: LLM系统性地高估了较弱投稿的评分，在主题关注点上与人类评审存在分歧（低估Clarity、高估Reproducibility），生成的评审文本长度为人类的2-3倍但词汇多样性更低。提示注入攻击依然高度有效，简单的隐式指令可在相当比例的案例中将低分论文提升至接受级别的评分，且攻击效果在不同模型族间差异显著。
AI.conclusion: 尽管LLM在结构化评估方面具有一定效用，但其在同行评审中的整合需要针对固有偏见和对抗性风险建立防护机制。

title: Single View Seafloor Recovery from Imaging Sonar via Differentiable Rendering
summary:
Sonar is often the only modality suitable for high-resolution imaging underwater due to light attenuation and turbidity. Forward-looking imaging sonar provides measurements over range and horizontal angle but collapses vertical structure into a flat image, creating ambiguities that make 3D recovery challenging. A common use case for imaging sonar is underwater terrain mapping (bathymetry), yet current methods require many views, expensive multi-sensor setups, or significant training data, which limits use and adaptability to new environments.
  We present a training-free method that recovers bathymetry from a single sonar image in under 30 seconds via differentiable rendering, conditioned on a known seafloor tilt. To our knowledge, this is the first differentiable rendering approach for single-view height recovery in sonar. Our method implements differentiable sonar ray tracing and optimizes an explicit height field to reproduce the target image. On synthetic datasets, our approach outperforms a supervised CNN under distribution shift and remains close on rough terrain, while the CNN wins in-distribution. By modeling physically grounded priors of the sonar process, our method adapts across sensor configurations and environments without training data.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于可微渲染的无训练单视图声纳水深恢复方法，通过物理建模的声纳光线追踪优化显式高度场，在30秒内从单张前视成像声纳图像中恢复水下地形，在分布偏移场景下优于有监督CNN方法。
AI.motivation: 前视成像声纳在水平方向提供高分辨率测量，但在垂直方向上坍塌为平面图像，导致三维重建存在模糊性；现有的水下地形测绘方法要么需要多视图、昂贵多传感器配置，要么依赖大量训练数据，限制了其在新环境中的适应性和实用性。
AI.method: 提出了一种无训练的单视图水深恢复方法，基于可微渲染管线实现；该方法通过可微声纳光线追踪模拟声纳成像过程，在已知海床倾斜角条件下优化一个显式的高度场，使其渲染结果与目标声纳图像一致，从而在30秒内从单张图像中恢复地形高度。
AI.result: 在合成数据集上，该方法在分布偏移场景下性能优于有监督CNN，在粗糙地形上性能接近；CNN仅在分布内数据上表现更优；该方法无需训练数据即可跨传感器配置和环境泛化。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模声纳成像过程的物理先验，可微渲染方法能够在无需训练数据的情况下实现高效、自适应的单视图水深恢复，为声纳三维重建提供了一种轻量级、可泛化的新范式。

title: HyperGuide: Hyperbolic Guidance for Efficient Multi-Step Reasoning in Large Language Models
summary: Multi-step reasoning remains a central challenge for large language models: single-pass generation is efficient but lacks accuracy; tree-search methods explore multiple paths but are computation-heavy. We address this gap by distilling reasoning progress into a hyperbolic geometric signal that guides step-by-step generation. Our approach is motivated by a structural observation: in combinatorial reasoning trees, solution-bearing states are few while dead ends are exponentially numerous. The hyperbolic space matches this asymmetry, with compact volume near the origin and exponentially expanding capacity toward the boundary, so that distance-to-origin naturally encodes solution proximity while angular separation distinguishes branches requiring different next operations. We train a lightweight head to project LLM hidden states into this space, then fine-tune a low-rank adapter interactively on its own reasoning attempts to act on the injected signal. Across multiple benchmarks, the geometric signal yields consistent gains, with larger improvements on deeper reasoning chains. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/yuyuliu11037/HyperGuide.

AI.tldr: 提出将推理进展蒸馏为双曲几何信号，引导大语言模型逐步生成推理路径，在保持单步生成效率的同时提升多步推理准确性，在多项基准上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型的多步推理面临两难：单步生成高效但准确性不足，树搜索方法虽能探索多条路径但计算开销巨大，现有方法难以在效率与准确性之间取得良好平衡。
AI.method: 基于组合推理树中解状态稀少而死路指数级增长的结构观察，利用双曲空间近原点紧凑、边界指数扩张的几何特性，设计距离-原点自然编码解接近度、角度分离区分分支的信号。训练轻量级头将LLM隐藏状态投影到双曲空间，并通过低秩适配器在其自身推理尝试上交互式微调以响应注入信号。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试上，双曲几何信号引导的推理方法取得一致性能提升，且在更深推理链上改进幅度更大，验证了该方法对长程推理的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 几何信号能够有效引导大语言模型的多步推理过程，兼具单步生成的高效性与树搜索的准确性优势，且推理链越深收益越显著，为推理增强提供了一种轻量级新范式。

title: HyLaT: Efficient Multi-Agent Communication via Hybrid Latent-Text Protocol
summary: Communication protocol design is a central challenge in large language model-based multi-agent systems. Existing single-channel approaches face an inherent communication trilemma: text-based methods are interpretable but verbose, while latent-space methods are efficient but opaque and limited to unidirectional workflows. Inspired by multi-channel communication theory, we propose HyLaT, a hybrid latent-text communication protocol that transmits elaborate cognitive signals through a latent channel for efficiency, while expressing concise critical signals in natural language to preserve interpretability and precision. We introduce a two-stage training framework combining single-agent hybrid generation learning and multi-agent interactive co-training, enabling agents to generate and interpret hybrid messages across multiple rounds of interaction. Experiments demonstrate that HyLaT reduces communication overhead significantly while maintaining competitive task performance, with strong generalization and robustness across diverse settings.

AI.tldr: HyLaT提出了一种混合潜在-文本通信协议，用于基于大语言模型的多智能体系统，通过在潜在通道中传输高效但不可读的认知信号、同时用自然语言表达关键信号来兼顾效率与可解释性，实验表明该方法显著降低通信开销并保持竞争性任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的多智能体系统面临通信三难困境：基于文本的方法可解释但冗长，基于潜在空间的方法高效但不可解释且仅支持单向工作流。研究者旨在同时实现通信的高效性、可解释性和双向交互能力。
AI.method: HyLaT设计了混合潜在-文本通信协议，将复杂的认知信号通过潜在通道传输以提高效率，同时用自然语言表达简洁的关键信号以保持可解释性和精确性。研究者提出了两阶段训练框架，包括单智能体混合生成学习和多智能体交互式协同训练，使智能体能在多轮交互中生成和解析混合消息。
AI.result: 实验表明HyLaT在保持竞争性任务性能的同时显著降低了通信开销，并在多种设置下展现出强大的泛化能力和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HyLaT从多通道通信理论中获得启发，有效解决了大语言模型多智能体系统中的通信三难困境，提供了一种兼顾效率与可解释性的通信协议方案，为未来多智能体通信设计提供了新范式。

title: Radiuma: A Unified Zero-Code Executable Graphical Workflow Generator for Reproducible and Shareable Medical Image Analysis and Machine Learning
summary: Medical image computing software is essential for identifying imaging biomarkers that can support diagnosis, prognosis, treatment planning, and clinical research. However, the lack of standardized, user-friendly, and reproducible software environments has limited the broader adoption of advanced medical image analysis workflows. We present Radiuma, a freely available modular platform designed to support reliable and reproducible medical image analysis across multiple modalities and file formats. Radiuma integrates image reading, visualization, registration, fusion, processing, segmentation, radiomics feature extraction, and machine learning modules for classification, regression, and clustering. Its modular design allows users to execute each component independently or connect modules through a visual workflow system, where the output of one step can be graphically passed to the next. This enables the creation of custom, executable, and reproducible multi-step pipelines without requiring extensive programming expertise. Results from each module can be inspected directly in the visualization window, providing immediate feedback on processing quality and workflow accuracy. Radiuma also supports saving and sharing customized workflows, promoting transparency, reusability, and consistency across collaborative studies. By combining flexibility, usability, and standardized analysis tools, Radiuma provides a practical environment for radiomics and machine learning research in clinical and translational settings. The platform is designed to be accessible to users with diverse expertise, including radiologists, physicists, clinicians, and data scientists.

AI.tldr: Radiuma是一个免费、模块化的医学图像分析平台，集成了图像读取、可视化、配准、分割、放射组学特征提取和机器学习模块，支持通过可视化工作流系统构建可重复的多步分析流水线，无需大量编程经验。
AI.motivation: 医学影像计算软件对于识别支持诊断、预后、治疗规划和临床研究的影像生物标志物至关重要，然而缺乏标准化、用户友好且可复现的软件环境限制了先进医学图像分析工作流的广泛采用。
AI.method: Radiuma采用模块化平台设计，集成了图像读取、可视化、配准、融合、处理、分割、放射组学特征提取以及用于分类、回归和聚类的机器学习模块。其可视化工作流系统允许用户独立执行每个组件或通过图形化方式将模块连接成多步流水线，无需编程专业知识；工作流可保存和共享，结果可在可视化窗口中直接检查。
AI.result: 每个模块的结果可直接在可视化窗口中检查，提供对处理质量和工作流准确性的即时反馈；平台支持保存和共享自定义工作流，促进了协作研究中的透明度、可重用性和一致性。
AI.conclusion: Radiuma通过结合灵活性、易用性和标准化分析工具，为临床和转化研究中的放射组学和机器学习研究提供了实用环境，平台设计面向放射科医生、物理学家、临床医生和数据科学家等不同专业背景的用户，有助于推动可重复的医学图像分析工作流的广泛采用。

title: Neuro-Inspired Inverse Learning for Planning and Control
summary: We present a neuro-inspired framework for embodied planning and control. Building on three principles that enable fast and highly effective goal-directed behavior in the mammalian brain - paired forward/inverse internal models, open-loop multi-step motor commands, and sequential, hierarchical organization of action - our Inverter framework uses learned components, trained end-to-end through Inverse Learning (IL) and supplemented where natural by analytic or algorithmic modules; we formalize IL and delineate it from supervised, reinforcement, and imitation learning. IL bridges Reinforcement Learning (RL)-style amortization, which runs in a single forward pass but emits only one action at a time, and Optimal Control (OC)-style sequence planning over whole trajectories, but with iterative test-time computation. Single Inverters or hierarchical n=2 Inverter stacks match or improve on offline-RL and diffusion-planner baselines on all 3 maze2d and 6 antmaze D4RL variants by an average of +24.2% (range -1.9% to +78.2%), at one-to-two orders of magnitude less inference compute time. Distinctively, optimizing through the Figure of Merit (FoM) over the entire T-step action sequence - rather than per step - lets Inverters produce smooth, goal-coherent, trajectory-wide structure and reach control policies closer to the analytic optimum than the policy underlying the training data itself. We also identify a failure mode of IL: FoM hacking under narrow training-data coverage, which we mitigate by using random training data with broader coverage. As an application example, a Pulse Inverter synthesizes arbitrary single-qubit quantum gates with fidelity matching the standard iterative numerical baseline (GRAPE), at more than 1000x lower per-gate compute time. In summary, we conclude that IL enables a versatile class of world-interfaces, especially for latency- and resource-critical embodied AI.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种受神经科学启发的Inverter框架，通过逆学习（IL）桥接强化学习的单步快速推理和最优控制的整体轨迹规划，在D4RL基准上平均提升24.2%且推理速度降低一到两个数量级，并在量子门合成任务中实现超过1000倍加速。IL是一种新的学习范式，通过在整个动作序列上优化品质因数（FoM）而非逐步优化，能够产生全局连贯的轨迹结构。
AI.motivation: 强化学习（RL）的摊销策略每次前向推理仅输出单步动作，缺乏全局轨迹结构；最优控制（OC）虽能规划整个轨迹序列，但需要迭代式测试时计算，推理延迟高。现有方法难以同时兼顾单步快速推理与全局轨迹连贯性，特别是在延迟和资源受限的具身AI场景中。此外，哺乳动物大脑中快速目标导向行为的三个神经原理（配对前向/逆内部模型、开环多步运动命令、动作的顺序层次组织）尚未在端到端可学习的框架中得到系统整合。
AI.method: 提出Inverter框架，基于三个神经科学原理：配对的逆模型和正模型、开环多步运动命令、动作的层次化组织。通过逆学习（IL）进行端到端训练，IL被形式化为一种区别于监督学习、强化学习和模仿学习的新学习范式——它在整个T步动作序列上优化品质因数（FoM）而非逐步优化，桥接了RL式摊销（单次前向推理但仅输出单步动作）和OC式序列规划（迭代测试时计算）。单Inverter或层次化的n=2 Inverter堆栈可结合解析或算法模块，通过使用具有更广覆盖范围的随机训练数据来缓解FoM攻击这一失败模式。
AI.result: 在全部3个maze2d和6个antmaze D4RL变体上，单Inverter或层次化的n=2 Inverter堆栈相比离线RL和扩散规划器基线平均提升24.2%（范围-1.9%至+78.2%），推理计算时间降低一到两个数量级。Inverter产生的控制策略比训练数据本身的基础策略更接近解析最优，并能生成平滑、目标一致的全局轨迹结构。在脉冲反演（Pulse Inverter）应用中，合成单量子比特量子门的保真度达到与标准迭代数值基线GRAPE相当的水平，而每门计算时间降低超过1000倍。
AI.conclusion: 逆学习（IL）作为一种新的学习范式，能够有效桥接强化学习的快速单步推理与最优控制的全局轨迹规划，为延迟和资源关键的具身AI提供了一种通用的世界接口（world-interface）。Inverter框架通过在整个动作序列上优化品质因数，突破了传统逐步优化策略的局部性局限。IL存在训练数据覆盖范围不足时FoM攻击的失败模式，可通过更广覆盖的随机数据缓解。该框架在量子门合成任务中的成功也展示了其在具身AI之外的广泛应用潜力。

title: A Multi-Agent LLM Framework for Rating the Quality of Surgical Feedback
summary: Verbal feedback delivered by attending surgeons in the operating room plays a critical formative role in resident trainee skill acquisition. Yet, assessing the quality of trainer feedback and its effectiveness in influencing trainee behavior during live surgery remains a challenge. Prior studies assessed feedback content relying on extensive manual annotation by expert human raters and focused on developing broad taxonomies that overlook the qualitative aspects of feedback delivery such as clarity or urgency. Limited existing automated methods, including keyword analysis and topic modeling, also fail to capture these nuanced aspects. We introduce a two-stage LLM-based framework that discovers interpretable feedback quality criteria grounded in the context of surgical training. Our method uses multi-agent prompting and surgical domain knowledge injection to discover a small set of human interpretable scoring criteria (e.g., Encouraging, Urgent, Clear). These criteria are then used to automatically score live surgical feedback via an LLM-as-a-judge approach. Evaluation on 4.2k trainer feedback instances demonstrates that our AI-discovered criteria outperform prior content-based frameworks in predicting feedback effectiveness, including observed trainee behavioral adjustments and trainer approval. This work advances scalable, human-aligned assessment of communication quality in the operating room and provides a foundation for improving surgical teaching practices.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种两阶段LLM框架，通过多智能体提示和领域知识注入自动发现可解释的外科手术反馈质量评分标准（如鼓励性、紧迫性、清晰性），并利用LLM-as-a-judge方法对4.2k条现场手术反馈进行自动评分，在预测反馈有效性方面优于传统基于内容的框架。
AI.motivation: 手术中主治医师的口头反馈对住院医师技能习得至关重要，但现有评估方法依赖大量人工标注，且基于关键词分析和主题建模的自动化方法无法捕捉反馈的定性特征（如清晰度和紧迫性），缺乏可扩展且与人类对齐的反馈质量评估手段。
AI.method: 提出一种两阶段LLM框架：第一阶段利用多智能体提示（multi-agent prompting）并结合手术领域知识注入，自动发现少量人类可解释的反馈质量评分标准（如Encouraging、Urgent、Clear）；第二阶段采用LLM-as-a-judge方法，基于这些标准对现场手术反馈进行自动评分。
AI.result: 在4.2k条主治医师反馈实例上的评估表明，AI发现的评分标准在预测反馈有效性方面优于先前的基于内容的框架，包括预测住院医师的行为调整（trainee behavioral adjustments）和主治医师认可度（trainer approval）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作推动了手术室中沟通质量的可扩展、与人类对齐的自动评估，为改进外科教学实践提供了基础，并展示了LLM在感知医疗教学场景中细粒度反馈质量方面的潜力。

title: CRISP -- Clustering-Based Redundancy-Reduced Instance Sampling for Pathology Case Representation and Retrieval
summary: Digital pathology archives increasingly contain multiple whole-slide images (WSIs) per case, capturing spatially distinct tumour regions and reflecting intrinsic morphological heterogeneity. However, most existing approaches rely on a single pathologist-selected slide, thereby discarding potentially informative evidence distributed across the remaining WSIs. To date, no autonomous framework has been proposed for comprehensive multi-WSI case processing. Here, we present an unsupervised framework for case-level analysis that integrates information from all available slides within a case. Rather than relying on a single designated slide, the proposed approach constructs case-level representations by selectively distilling informative patches across WSIs. We introduce Clustering-Based Redundancy-Reduced Instance Sampling for Pathology (CRISP), a two-stage framework that first reduces redundancy within individual WSIs and subsequently applies clustering-based sampling to select a compact yet representative set of patches for the entire case. The resulting patch set captures case-level heterogeneity while avoiding exhaustive processing of gigapixel images, and directly serves as a retrieval index. Using two Mayo Clinic breast cancer datasets for diagnosis and treatment planning, we demonstrate that CRISP consistently matches or surpasses the current standard practice of combined model and pathologist slide selection for patient/case search and retrieval. By automating case-level processing and eliminating subjective WSI selection, CRISP potentially enables the exploitation of clinically relevant information distributed across multiple WSIs that is currently overlooked.

AI.tldr: 提出CRISP，一种无监督的多WSI病例级表征学习框架，通过聚类采样消除冗余并捕获跨切片异质性，在乳腺癌检索任务中匹配或超越依赖人工选片的临床标准方法。
AI.motivation: 现有数字病理学方法大多仅使用单张病理学家选取的WSI，忽略了同一病例中多张WSI所包含的空间异质性和潜在临床信息，且缺乏能够自动整合多个WSI进行病例级分析的通用框架。
AI.method: 提出CRISP（Clustering-Based Redundancy-Reduced Instance Sampling for Pathology）两阶段无监督框架：首先在单个WSI内部通过冗余缩减挑选代表性图块，然后跨所有WSI应用基于聚类的采样，筛选出紧凑且具代表性的病例级图块集合，用于构建病例级表征并直接作为检索索引。
AI.result: 在两个梅奥诊所的乳腺癌数据集（分别用于诊断和治疗规划）上，CRISP在患者/病例搜索与检索任务中持续达到或超越当前结合模型与病理学家手动选片的临床标准实践。
AI.conclusion: CRISP通过自动化病例级处理并消除主观的WSI选择，使传统方法遗漏的分布于多张WSI中的临床相关异质性信息得以被有效利用，为多WSI病例级分析提供了可行且无监督的解决方案。

title: Palette: A Modular, Controllable, and Efficient Framework for On-demand Authorized Safety Alignment Relaxation in LLMs
summary: Current safety alignment of foundation models largely follows a \emph{one-size-fits-all} paradigm, applying the same refusal policy across users and contexts. As a result, models may refuse requests that are unsafe for general users but legitimate for authorized professionals, limiting helpfulness in specialized professional settings. Existing approaches either require costly realignment or rely on inference-time steering that suffers from imprecise control and added latency. To this end, we propose \textsc{Palette}, a modular, controllable, and efficient framework that selectively relaxes refusal behavior on authorized target domains while preserving standard safety elsewhere. Our method identifies a refusal direction via multi-objective search and internalizes it into the model through lightweight adaptation. \textsc{Palette} further supports modular composition: it learns domain-specific safety controls independently and composes them through parameter merging, enabling on-demand multi-domain authorization without retraining. Experiments across four safety benchmarks, multiple model variants, and both LLMs and VLMs show that \textsc{Palette} delivers precise safety control without sacrificing general utility, offering a practical path toward foundation models that adapt to diverse professional needs.

AI.tldr: 提出Palette框架，通过模块化、可控且高效的方式选择性放松基础模型在授权专业领域的安全拒绝行为，在保持通用安全性的同时实现精确的领域级安全控制。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型的安全对齐采用“一刀切”范式，对所有用户和上下文应用相同的拒绝策略，导致模型会拒绝普通用户不安全但对授权专业人士合法的请求，限制了在专业场景下的有用性；现有方法要么需要昂贵的重新对齐，要么依赖推理时引导，存在控制不精确和额外延迟的问题。
AI.method: 提出Palette框架，通过多目标搜索识别拒绝方向，并通过轻量级适配将其内化到模型中；支持模块化组合，独立学习领域特定的安全控制，并通过参数合并实现按需的多域授权而无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在四个安全基准、多个模型变体以及LLM和VLM上的实验表明，Palette能够实现精确的安全控制，同时不牺牲通用实用性。
AI.conclusion: Palette为构建能适应多样化专业需求的基础模型提供了一条实用路径，通过模块化的安全控制实现了在授权领域放松拒绝行为与全局安全性之间的有效平衡。

title: A Lightweight Hybrid Transformer-CRF Architecture for Multi-Type Bangla Medical Entity Recognition
summary: MedER refers to the identification of medical entities. It is crucial for extracting structured clinical information from unstructured medical text. Many existing systems rely on transformer-based models, which are computationally expensive and difficult to deploy in resource-constrained environments. Furthermore, earlier works often use relaxed evaluation metrics that artificially inflate performance by rewarding correct prediction of dominant "Outside" (O) tokens. In this paper, we propose a lightweight Medical Entity Recognition (MedER) framework for the Bangla language. We establish a rigorous baseline using a 12-layer BanglaBERT model combined with a Conditional Random Field (CRF) layer for exact-boundary entity detection. To address deployment constraints, we compress this teacher model into a 4-layer student network through Knowledge Distillation (KD), where the student learns from the teacher's pre-CRF soft emission logits. Finally, we apply INT8 dynamic quantization to further reduce model size and inference cost. Our final quantized student achieves an 8.6x CPU speedup while requiring nearly 48 percent less storage than the CRF teacher model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向孟加拉语的轻量级医疗实体识别框架，通过知识蒸馏将12层BanglaBERT-CRF教师模型压缩为4层学生模型，并进一步应用INT8动态量化，最终在保持较高识别精度的同时实现了8.6倍CPU加速和近48%的存储缩减。
AI.motivation: 现有医疗实体识别系统多依赖基于Transformer的模型，计算成本高且难以部署在资源受限环境中；此外，先前工作常使用宽松的评估指标，通过奖励对主导的"Outside"（O）标记的正确预测而人为夸大性能。
AI.method: 本文提出了一个针对孟加拉语的轻量级MedER框架：首先构建一个12层BanglaBERT结合条件随机场（CRF）层的教师模型以实现精确边界实体检测；然后通过知识蒸馏将教师模型压缩为一个4层学生网络，学生从教师的CRF前软发射logits中学习；最后应用INT8动态量化进一步减小模型大小并降低推理成本。
AI.result: 最终量化后的学生模型在CPU上实现了8.6倍的速度提升，同时相比CRF教师模型节省了近48%的存储空间。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了通过知识蒸馏与量化压缩相结合的策略，能够在显著降低模型计算和存储开销的同时保持实体识别的有效性，为在资源受限环境下部署医疗实体识别系统提供了一条可行路径。

title: CoDA: Color Distribution Probing for Efficient and Generalizable AI-Generated Image Detection
summary: AI-generated image detection faces a persistent trade-off between generalization and efficiency: lightweight artifact-based methods often degrade on unseen generators or domains, whereas more robust large-scale models are computationally expensive. Meanwhile, existing benchmarks mainly focus on cross-model evaluation in photorealistic settings, leaving cross-domain robustness underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce FakeForm, a large-scale benchmark with approximately 370,000 images across 62 diverse domains for both cross-model and cross-domain evaluation. Motivated by this broader setting, we revisit color-distribution probing as an efficient complementary cue for AI-generated image detection. We observe that, especially for photographic content, real photographs tend to exhibit smoother and more stable color patterns, whereas synthetic images often show characteristic color imbalances introduced by neural generation. Based on this observation, we propose CoDA, a compact 1.48M-parameter detector built on a Noise-Quantization Probe, together with a theoretical analysis linking probe responses to color non-uniformity. Experiments show that CoDA achieves state-of-the-art performance on standard benchmarks and the best results on the challenging cross-domain evaluation of FakeForm, while remaining highly competitive in cross-model photorealistic settings. These results suggest that persistent generative artifacts can provide a practical foundation for efficient and robust AI-generated image detection. The models and FakeForm benchmark will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: 提出FakeForm基准（含62个领域、约37万图像）用于跨模型与跨域AI生成图像检测，并设计基于颜色分布探针的轻量级检测器CoDA（1.48M参数），在标准与跨域评测中均取得最优或竞争力结果。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测面临泛化性与效率的权衡：基于伪影的轻量方法在未见生成器或领域上性能退化，而大模型鲁棒但计算昂贵；同时现有基准主要关注跨模型评估，跨领域鲁棒性未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 构建了FakeForm大规模基准，包含约37万图像覆盖62个多样领域；提出CoDA检测器，核心为噪声量化探针（Noise-Quantization Probe），仅1.48M参数，利用真实照片颜色分布更平滑稳定而合成图像存在颜色不平衡的观察，并通过理论分析建立探针响应与颜色非均匀性的联系。
AI.result: CoDA在标准基准上达到最先进性能，在FakeForm最具挑战性的跨域评测中取得最佳结果，同时在跨模型照片级设置中保持高度竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 结果表明，生成图像中存在的持久性伪影可作为高效鲁棒的AI生成图像检测的实用基础，颜色分布探测是兼顾效率与泛化性的有效互补线索。

title: A Sober Look at Agentic Misalignment in Automated Workflows
summary: We study a class of emergent misalignment in multi-agent systems (MAS), with a focus on automated workflows, which we refer to agentic misalignment. Although these systems can solve complex tasks, they often fail because agents act according to implicit proxy utilities that do not align with the intended human goals. We formally define these behaviors and analyze them within a Bayesian framework, showing that generic utilities naturally lead to posterior collapse of agents in automated workflows. To address this issue, we propose Agentic Evidence Attribution (AEA), a novel alignment paradigm that improves agent posteriors using context-specific evidence. AEA reasons over agent actions and provides structured evidence to correct misaligned behavior during collaboration. To better understand the role of evidence, we study two instantiations of AEA: self-reflection (internal evidence from the model) and weak-to-strong generalization (external evidence on the agentic trajectory). We show that a small evidence model effectively aligns the MAS by providing orthogonal failure attribution. Our results clarify the sources of agentic misalignment in automated workflows and show that evidence-based alignment can effectively improve agent collaboration and leads to reliable multi-agent systems built on automated workflows.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并形式化定义了多智能体系统中的"智能体错位"问题，并提出了基于贝叶斯框架的Agentic Evidence Attribution (AEA)对齐范式，通过结构化证据纠正自动工作流中智能体的隐式代理效用偏差，从而提升多智能体协作的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 多智能体系统在自动化工作流中虽能解决复杂任务，但由于智能体常常根据与人类意图不一致的隐式代理效用行事，导致系统出现涌现性的错位行为，即智能体错位（agentic misalignment），现有方法缺乏对此类问题的形式化定义与系统性解决方案。
AI.method: 本文首先在贝叶斯框架下形式化定义了智能体错位，证明通用效用函数会导致自动化工作流中智能体的后验坍缩；进而提出Agentic Evidence Attribution (AEA)对齐范式，通过推理智能体行为并提供上下文相关的结构化证据来纠正错位；具体实例化包括自我反思（基于模型内部证据）和弱到强泛化（基于智能体轨迹的外部证据）两种方式。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，AEA框架能够有效纠正多智能体系统中的错位行为，其中小规模证据模型通过提供正交的失败归因显著提升了多智能体系统的对齐效果，改善了智能体协作的可靠性和任务完成质量。
AI.conclusion: 本文阐明了自动化工作流中智能体错位的根源，并证明基于证据的对齐方法能够有效改善智能体协作，为构建可靠的多智能体系统提供了一种新的范式，未来可进一步探索证据模型的设计与可扩展性。

title: Retrieval as Reasoning: Self-Evolving Agent-Native Retrieval via LLM-Wiki
summary: LLM agents require retrieval to behave less like one-shot context fetching and more like reasoning: searching, reading, traversing, and deciding when evidence is sufficient. However, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) typically organizes external knowledge as flat chunks retrieved by embedding similarity, exposing a retrieval-as-lookup interface that is poorly aligned with tool-using agents. We propose LLM-Wiki, an agent-native retrieval system that operationalizes the Retrieval-as-Reasoning paradigm by treating external knowledge as a compilable, composable, and self-evolving structure rather than a static retrieval index. LLM-Wiki compiles documents into structured Wiki pages with bidirectional links, exposes search, read, and link-following operations through standard tool-calling interfaces, and introduces an Error Book for persistent structural and semantic self-correction. On HotpotQA, MuSiQue, and 2WikiMultiHopQA, LLM-Wiki outperforms seven baselines, including HippoRAG 2, LightRAG, and GraphRAG, with gains of 2.0-8.1 F1 points over the strongest graph-based baseline and larger gains over Dense RAG. On AuthTrace, LLM-Wiki achieves the best overall accuracy, with especially strong gains on multi-document structured queries, showing that compilation-based knowledge organization generalizes beyond chain-style multi-hop reasoning.

AI.tldr: LLM-Wiki 提出检索即推理范式，将外部知识编译为具有双向链接的结构化 Wiki 页面，并通过工具调用接口暴露搜索、阅读和链接追踪操作，同时引入错误簿实现持久化自纠错，在多项多跳问答基准上显著优于现有 RAG 系统。
AI.motivation: 现有 RAG 系统将外部知识组织为扁平化分块并通过嵌入相似度进行检索，这种"检索即查找"的接口与需要推理能力的工具型智能体不匹配，LLM 智能体需要更接近推理行为的检索方式——即搜索、阅读、遍历及判断证据充分性。
AI.method: LLM-Wiki 将文档编译为具有双向链接的结构化 Wiki 页面，通过标准工具调用接口暴露搜索、阅读和链接追踪三种操作，并引入错误簿（Error Book）机制实现结构性和语义层面的持久化自纠错，使外部知识成为可编译、可组合、可自演化的结构而非静态索引。
AI.result: 在 HotpotQA、MuSiQue 和 2WikiMultiHopQA 上，LLM-Wiki 以 2.0-8.1 个 F1 点的优势超越最强图基基线方法（HippoRAG 2、LightRAG、GraphRAG 等七种基线），在 AuthTrace 上取得最佳总体准确率，尤其是在多文档结构化查询上表现优异，证明基于编译的知识组织方式泛化能力超越链式多跳推理场景。
AI.conclusion: LLM-Wiki 验证了检索即推理范式的有效性，表明将外部知识编译为结构化、可演化的知识库并通过工具调用接口与智能体交互，能够显著提升多跳推理和结构化查询场景下的检索准确性，为构建真正具备推理能力的智能体检索系统提供了新方向。

title: SparseWorld: Enhancing End-to-End Autonomous Driving via World Models with Sparse Scene Representation
summary: Recently, world models have made significant progress in enhancing end-to-end driving systems through both future situation forecasting and improved scene understanding. However, existing driving world models are typically built upon dense scene representations, causing high computational costs and redundant information. In this paper, we present SparseWorld, a lightweight world model that focuses on predicting only the critical layout of the scene, enabling efficient future forecasting for end-to-end driving systems. SparseWorld first performs autoregressive rollout to forecast future map elements and surrounding agents, enabling the model to learn how driving scenarios evolve over time. It then leverages these predicted futures to refine downstream motion prediction and trajectory planning. Specifically, we propose a Sparse Dreamer that anticipates future instances in the latent space through joint temporal and spatial attention. By interacting with predicted future instances, the motion planner captures more accurate motion patterns and generates more informed and safety-aware trajectories. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SparseWorld significantly reduces collision risk and achieves state-of-the-art performance on the open-loop planning metrics of the nuScenes dataset with a collision rate of 0.05\%. Moreover, it substantially outperforms the baseline method in closed-loop planning metrics on the Bench2Drive benchmark. Supplementary material is available at the project page: https://wryzju.github.io/SparseWorld/.

AI.tldr: SparseWorld提出了一种轻量级驾驶世界模型，通过仅预测场景中的关键布局要素（地图元素和周围智能体）来实现高效的未来预测，并在nuScenes数据集上以0.05%的碰撞率取得了开环规划指标的最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的驾驶世界模型通常基于密集的场景表示进行构建，导致计算成本高且存在大量冗余信息，缺乏一种能够高效预测驾驶场景演化的轻量级方案。
AI.method: SparseWorld首先通过自回归展开（autoregressive rollout）预测未来的地图元素和周围智能体，使模型学习驾驶场景的演化过程；随后利用这些预测结果优化下游的运动预测和轨迹规划。其核心组件Sparse Dreamer通过联合时空注意力在潜空间中预测未来实例，运动规划器通过与预测的未来实例交互捕获更准确的运动模式并生成更安全、更具感知能力的轨迹。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上，SparseWorld以0.05%的碰撞率在开环规划指标上达到最先进水平；在Bench2Drive基准的闭环规划指标上，其表现也显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SparseWorld验证了仅预测场景关键布局而非密集场景表示的轻量级世界模型在端到端驾驶中的有效性，为未来高效、安全的自动驾驶规划提供了新的思路。

title: When Does Multi-Agent RL Improve LLM Workflows? Workflow, Scale, and Policy-Sharing Tradeoffs
summary: Multi-agent LLM workflows route inference through specialized roles to lift end-task accuracy, but jointly training those roles with reinforcement learning is unstable in ways that are poorly understood. We study when end-to-end RL training of multi-agent LLM workflows improves over their base models, comparing Shared-Policy training, where all roles update one policy, with Isolated-Policy training, where each role has its own parameters. Our experimental matrix spans Eval-Opt, Voting, and Orch-Workers workflows, math and code tasks, and three model scales (0.6B, 1.7B, 4B). We find that multi-agent RL usually improves over base models, but gains depend jointly on workflow, task, and scale, not on policy sharing alone. Isolated-Policy tends to reach higher peak accuracy yet more often falls off a terminal accuracy cliff, while Shared-Policy training does not eliminate failure; it redistributes failure into qualitatively different patterns. We then explain the strongest of these patterns through role-level gradient dynamics induced by workflow topology and policy routing: under Isolated-Policy, parallel same-role agents on shared prompts amplify per-role gradients and drive terminal degradation in Voting and Orch-Workers workflows; under Shared-Policy, asymmetric per-step gradient mass causes the shared policy to be captured by the dominant role, producing different failure signatures by task and workflow. Together, the empirical map and its underlying mechanisms show that policy sharing routes training pressure through different channels rather than offering uniform stability, making it a design choice with workflow- and task-conditional tradeoffs.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了多智能体LLM工作流中端到端强化学习训练的稳定性问题，发现联合训练能否提升性能取决于工作流、任务和模型规模的组合，而非仅由策略共享决定；隔离策略训练虽能达到更高峰值精度但更易陷入性能悬崖，而共享策略训练则通过不同的梯度动力学通道重新分布失败模式，两者存在工作流与任务条件相关的权衡。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM工作流通过将推理过程路由到多个专业化角色来提升最终任务精度，但使用强化学习对这些角色进行联合训练时存在不稳定的问题，其内在机制尚不明确，缺乏系统性的理解。
AI.method: 论文在Eval-Opt、Voting、Orch-Workers三种工作流上，对数学推理和代码生成两类任务，在0.6B、1.7B、4B三种模型规模下，系统比较了共享策略训练（所有角色共用一个策略参数）与隔离策略训练（每个角色拥有独立参数）的效果，并通过角色级梯度动力学分析解释观察到的失败模式。
AI.result: 多智能体RL通常能提升基座模型性能，但提升效果共同依赖于工作流、任务和模型规模。隔离策略训练倾向于达到更高峰值精度，但更容易陷入终端精度悬崖；共享策略训练并未消除失败，而是将失败重新分布为性质不同的模式。隔离策略下，并行同角色智能体在共享提示上的梯度放大导致Voting和Orch-Workers工作流中出现终端退化；共享策略下，不对称的每步梯度质量使得共享策略被主导角色捕获，产生因任务和工作流而异的失败特征。
AI.conclusion: 策略共享并非提供统一的稳定性，而是通过不同的通道路由训练压力，使其成为一种具有工作流和任务条件依赖性的设计选择，需要在不同场景下权衡利弊。

title: When In-Distribution Gains Fail: Evaluating Weak-to-Strong Reward Models under Preference Shift
summary: Weak-to-strong (W2S) generalization is a promising framework for scalable oversight, yet existing evaluations often test students under matched train--test distributions. Therefore, we study W2S preference learning under zero-shot distribution shift and find that strong students trained on weak preference labels can appear successful in-distribution while failing to transfer across preference datasets. We provide evidence for a representational failure mode in which weak-supervised fine-tuning can pull the strong model toward source-domain features instead of maintaining broadly transferable preference representations. To mitigate this, we propose Representation Anchoring (Anchor), a simple yet effective regularizer that constrains excessive drift from the pretrained strong model's representation space during fine-tuning, while still allowing task-relevant adaptation. Across preference domains, datasets, and model families, Anchor consistently improves out-of-distribution transfer while maintaining competitive in-distribution performance. Together, our evaluation protocol, transfer-aware metrics, and method expose hidden brittleness in current W2S reward modeling and provide a practical path toward more robust preference transfer.

AI.tldr: 本文研究弱到强（W2S）偏好学习在零样本分布偏移下的泛化问题，发现弱监督微调会导致强模型向源域特征偏移而非保持可迁移的偏好表征，并提出表征锚定（Anchor）正则化方法，有效提升跨分布迁移性能。
AI.motivation: 现有W2S泛化评估通常在匹配的训练-测试分布下进行，忽略了实际部署中可能遇到的分布偏移问题；因此本文旨在探究强模型在弱偏好标签监督下，面对零样本分布偏移时的泛化失败模式及其原因。
AI.method: 提出表征锚定（Representation Anchoring, Anchor）正则化方法，在微调过程中约束强模型相对于预训练表征空间的过度漂移，同时允许任务相关的适应性调整，从而避免弱监督导致模型向源域特征偏移。
AI.result: 在多个偏好领域、数据集和模型家族上，Anchor一致提升了强模型在分布外（OOD）的迁移性能，同时保持了具有竞争力的分布内（ID）表现；实验揭示了弱监督微调中存在的表征失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 本研究暴露了当前W2S奖励建模中隐藏的脆弱性，证明现有方法在分布偏移下可能表面成功而实际失效，并提出了一种提升偏好迁移鲁棒性的实用路径。

title: VectorArk: Learning Practical Image Vectorization with Rounded Polygon Representation
summary: Recent vision-language model (VLM)-based approaches have achieved impressive results on image vectorization tasks. However, they are typically evaluated on synthetic benchmarks, where clean SVGs are rasterized at high resolution and then re-vectorized. As a result, these methods generalize poorly to real-world scenarios, such as images with unknown rasterization methods or those generated by text-to-image models. We introduce VectorArk, a new VLM-based model designed for robust and practical image vectorization. VectorArk employs a novel rounded polygon representation that simplifies the learning process while naturally producing smooth, visually appealing primitives. We also propose a degradation model that enhances robustness across diverse and imperfect inputs. Our experiments show that, in contrast to previous methods, VectorArk achieves superior geometric completeness and artifact suppression across multiple datasets, with comprehensive ablations validating the contribution of each component.

AI.tldr: VectorArk 提出了一种基于 VLM 的图像矢量化模型，采用新颖的圆角多边形表示和退化模型，在真实场景下实现了比现有方法更优的几何完整性和伪影抑制能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的 VLM 矢量化方法主要在合成基准上评估，这些基准使用干净的 SVG 经高分辨率光栅化后再重新矢量化，导致方法在面对未知光栅化方式或由文生图模型生成的现实图像时泛化能力差。
AI.method: VectorArk 提出了一种圆角多边形表示方法，简化了学习过程并自然生成平滑美观的图元；同时设计了一个退化模型以增强模型对多样且不完美输入的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，与以往方法相比，VectorArk 在多个数据集上实现了更优的几何完整性和伪影抑制效果；全面的消融实验验证了各模块的贡献。
AI.conclusion: VectorArk 为实际图像矢量化任务提供了一种更鲁棒且实用的方案，填补了现有方法在真实场景下泛化能力不足的空白，其组件设计经验可为后续研究提供参考。

title: Beyond Final Answers: Auditing Trajectory-Level Hallucinations in Multi-Agent Industrial Workflows
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents that reason, use tools, and act over multiple steps. Yet most hallucination benchmarks still evaluate only the final output, missing failures that originate in intermediate Thought-Action-Observation steps. We present Trajel, a dataset and evaluation framework for auditing trajectory-level hallucinations in multi-agent industrial workflows. Trajel introduces a five-type hallucination taxonomy (factual, referential, logical, procedural, and scope-based) over expert-annotated agent traces from AssetOpsBench. We benchmark supervised detection models at the subtask, trajectory, and long-context levels. Our results show that the most common failure modes are missed by existing benchmarks, that nearly half of hallucinated trajectories involve multiple types at once, and that automated detectors with high binary accuracy still misclassify the subtlest types. Trajectory-aware detection significantly outperforms standard post-hoc verification, making taxonomy-grounded evaluation necessary for safer agentic deployment.

AI.tldr: Trajel是一个面向多智能体工业工作流中轨迹级幻觉的评估框架，提出了五类幻觉分类体系，证明了现有基准的不足以及轨迹感知检测方法相对于后验验证的显著优势。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型幻觉评测基准大多仅关注最终输出，忽视了多步推理过程中中间步骤（思考-行动-观察）产生的幻觉，缺乏对工业多智能体工作流中轨迹级幻觉的系统性评估。
AI.method: 本文提出了Trajel数据集与评估框架，基于AssetOpsBench中专家标注的智能体轨迹，引入了一个包含事实性、指代性、逻辑性、过程性和范围性五类幻觉的分类体系，并在子任务、轨迹和长上下文三个层次上评测了有监督检测模型。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，现有基准遗漏了最常见的失败模式；近一半的幻觉轨迹涉及多种幻觉类型；高二元准确率的自动检测器仍无法正确分类最细微的幻觉类型；轨迹感知的检测方法显著优于标准的后验验证方法。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹级幻觉是多智能体工作流中普遍且复杂的问题，基于分类学的评估对于更安全的智能体部署至关重要，轨迹感知的检测方法相比事后验证具有明显优势。

title: Reinforcement Learning from Denoising Feedback
summary: Policy loss estimation remains a fundamental and long-standing challenge in reinforcement learning (RL) for diffusion language models (dLLMs). We introduce Reinforcement Learning from Denoising Feedback (RLDF), a novel training paradigm that leverages feedback obtained from rollout and training processes to facilitate accurate and efficient policy loss estimation. To balance the trade-off between computational efficiency and estimation effectiveness, RLDF optimizes the model toward the clipped clean state $\hat{x}_0$ from intermediate noisy states $x_t$, combined with weighted timestep sampling over $t$. Extensive experiments demonstrate that RLDF achieves consistent and substantial improvements in both performance and generalizability across two representative dLLM architectures, LLaDA and Dream, on multiple reasoning benchmarks. Our work lays a principled foundation for scalable reinforcement learning in diffusion language models. We build Drift, a training framework for dLLMs, available at https://github.com/ant-research/Drift.

AI.tldr: 本文提出强化学习去噪反馈（RLDF），一种利用训练和推理过程中的去噪反馈来高效准确估计策略损失的新方法，通过在中间噪声状态上优化模型向裁剪干净状态逼近，并结合加权时间步采样，在两种扩散语言模型架构上显著提升了推理性能与泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 扩散语言模型（dLLMs）的策略损失估计是强化学习训练中的一个长期挑战，现有方法在计算效率与估计有效性之间难以取得良好平衡，亟需一种更准确高效的策略损失估计范式。
AI.method: RLDF从中间噪声状态$x_t$出发，将模型优化方向钳制到裁剪干净状态$\hat{x}_0$，同时引入加权时间步采样机制来平衡不同噪声程度样本的贡献，从而在保证计算效率的前提下实现有效的策略损失估计。
AI.result: 在LLaDA和Dream两种代表性扩散语言模型架构上，RLDF在多个推理基准测试中取得了持续且显著的性能提升和更强的泛化能力，验证了方法的有效性和通用性。
AI.conclusion: RLDF为扩散语言模型的可扩展强化学习训练奠定了原则性基础，提供的Drift训练框架（https://github.com/ant-research/Drift）有望推动该方向的进一步研究与实际应用。

title: Coarse-to-Fine Domain Incremental Learning with Attentive Distillation for Mining Footprint Segmentation in Multispectral Imagery
summary: Automatically mapping and segmenting global mining footprints using remote sensing and deep learning is critical for monitoring the socio-environmental risks and impacts of mining, yet its progress is hindered by the scarcity of fine-grained annotated data. Although large-scale datasets with coarse boundaries are widely available, leveraging them to improve fine-grained segmentation is challenging due to significant domain shift. To address this, we propose MineC2FNet, a coarse-to-fine domain incremental learning framework that exploits abundant coarse data to enhance fine-grained mining footprint segmentation. MineC2FNet adopts a teacher-student architecture with attentive distillation at both the feature and prediction levels, selectively transferring generalized knowledge from the coarse domain while enabling boundary refinement using limited fine-grained data (fine domain). We further introduce an expertly validated dataset of 219 images with precise boundary annotations across diverse geographies and commodities. Extensive experiments against state-of-the-art approaches, including domain adaptation and domain incremental learning methods, demonstrate that MineC2FNet achieves superior performance while effectively handling domain shift. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/risqiutama/MineC2FNet.

AI.tldr: MineC2FNet提出了一种粗到精的域增量学习框架，利用丰富的粗粒度边界数据结合有限的细粒度标注数据，实现全球采矿足迹的高精度分割，在多个指标上超越现有域适应和域增量学习方法。
AI.motivation: 利用遥感和深度学习自动映射与分割全球采矿足迹对监测采矿的社会环境风险至关重要，但细粒度标注数据的稀缺严重阻碍了该领域的发展。尽管粗边界的大规模数据集广泛可用，但由于显著的域偏移，直接利用它们来改进细粒度分割面临巨大挑战。
AI.method: 提出MineC2FNet，一种基于师生架构的粗到精域增量学习框架，在特征和预测两个层面引入注意力蒸馏机制，选择性迁移粗域中的通用知识，同时利用有限的细粒度数据进行边界细化。此外，构建了一个经过专家验证的包含219张图像及精确边界标注的数据集，覆盖多种地理区域和矿产品种。
AI.result: 在与多种最先进的域适应和域增量学习方法的大规模对比实验中，MineC2FNet在采矿足迹分割任务上取得了优于所有对比方法的性能，有效处理了粗域到细域之间的域偏移问题，在细粒度分割精度上实现显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证实了通过粗到精的域增量学习范式能够有效利用大规模粗标注数据来提升细粒度遥感分割任务的表现，为数据稀缺场景下的全球采矿监测提供了可行的技术路径，数据集和代码已开源以供后续研究使用。

title: Partner-Aware Hierarchical Skill Discovery for Robust Human-AI Collaboration
summary: Multi-agent collaboration, especially in human-AI teaming, requires agents that can adapt to novel partners with diverse and dynamic behaviors. Conventional Deep Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning (DHRL) methods focus on agent-centric rewards and overlook partner behavior, leading to shortcut learning, where skills exploit spurious information instead of adapting to partners' dynamic behaviors. This limitation undermines agents' ability to adapt and coordinate effectively with novel partners. We introduce Partner-Aware Skill Discovery (PASD), a DHRL framework that learns skills conditioned on partner behavior. PASD introduces a contrastive intrinsic reward to capture patterns emerging from partner interactions, aligning skill representations across similar partners while maintaining discriminability across diverse strategies. By structuring the skill space based on partner interactions, this approach mitigates shortcut learning and promotes behavioral consistency, enabling robust and adaptive coordination. We extensively evaluate PASD in the Overcooked-AI benchmark with a diverse population of partners characterized by varying skill levels and play styles. We further evaluate the approach with human proxy models trained from human-human gameplay trajectories. PASD consistently outperforms existing population-based and hierarchical baselines, demonstrating transferable skill learning that generalizes across a wide range of partner behaviors. Analysis of learned skill representations shows that PASD adapts effectively to diverse partner behaviors, highlighting its robustness in human-AI collaboration.

AI.tldr: 提出PASD框架，通过对比内在奖励机制使深度分层强化学习中的技能学习以合作伙伴行为为条件，消除捷径学习，实现在Overcooked-AI及人类代理基准上对多样化合作伙伴的鲁棒自适应协调。
AI.motivation: 现有深度分层强化学习方法在设计代理人奖励时忽视合作伙伴行为，导致捷径学习——技能利用虚假信息而非适应合作伙伴的动态行为，从而严重限制了智能体在多人协作尤其是人机协作场景中与新型合作伙伴有效协调的能力。
AI.method: 提出伙伴感知技能发现框架，在DHRL中引入对比内在奖励机制，通过捕获合作伙伴交互中涌现的模式，在相似合作伙伴间对齐技能表征的同时保持对不同策略的判别性，使技能空间基于合作伙伴交互进行结构化组织，从而消除捷径学习并促进行为一致性。
AI.result: 在Overcooked-AI基准测试中，面对具有不同技能水平和玩法风格的多样化合作伙伴群体以及基于人-人游戏轨迹训练的人类代理模型，PASD在习得可迁移技能和跨广泛合作伙伴行为泛化方面持续优于现有基于种群和分层的基线方法，技能表征分析表明其能有效适应多样化合作伙伴行为。
AI.conclusion: PASD通过将技能学习显式条件化于合作伙伴行为并设计对比内在奖励来结构化工技能空间，有效缓解了DHRL中的捷径学习问题，为人机协作中的鲁棒自适应协调提供了新范式，证明了在复杂多代理环境中学习可迁移协作技能的有效性。

title: Llamion Technical Report
summary: We release Llamion, a family of 14B-parameter open-weight language models obtained by transforming Orion-14B into the standardized Llama-family architecture. The transformation is performed by Efficient Knowledge Preservation for Transformation (KEPT), a recipe that combines (i) Normal Parameter Mapping (NPM) for unchanged modules, (ii) Optimized Parameter Mapping (OPM), a training-free LayerNorm-to-RMSNorm initialization we prove optimal under the near-zero-mean activation regime induced by weight decay, and (iii) Cross-architecture Knowledge Distillation (XKD), an equal-size frozen-teacher distillation that aligns the converted model's outputs with the source model's on any reasonable input distribution. Llamion recovers Orion's behaviour on H6, MT-Bench, and KoMMLU with only ~123M tokens on a single A100 in four days; Llamion-Base reaches 66.87% on KoMMLU, exceeding the next-best entry of the Open Ko LLM Leaderboard by >7.0 absolute points at submission time. Capabilities entirely absent from the transfer corpus (Python programming and 200K-token context handling) survive the architectural transition intact. We release three checkpoints (Base, Chat, LongChat) that load with trust_remote_code=False in the Hugging Face Transformers library.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KEPT方法，将Orion-14B模型转换为Llama架构的Llamion系列（14B参数），通过归一化参数映射、训练-free的LayerNorm-to-RMSNorm最优初始化及等大小冻结教师知识蒸馏，仅用~1.23亿token和单张A100（四天）即可恢复源模型行为，在KoMMLU上达到66.87%，并保留了迁移语料中未出现的Python编程和20万token长上下文能力。
AI.motivation: 现有开源语言模型采用不同的架构设计，不同系列模型（如Orion与Llama）之间的架构差异导致无法直接复用兼容生态（如Hugging Face Transformers库）；如何高效地将非标准架构模型无损转换为标准化架构、同时保留其原有能力和知识，是一个尚未被充分研究的实际问题。
AI.method: 提出Efficient Knowledge Preservation for Transformation (KEPT) 方法，包含三个关键组件：(i) Normal Parameter Mapping (NPM) 直接复用在两类架构中保持不变的模块参数；(ii) Optimized Parameter Mapping (OPM) 是一种训练-free的LayerNorm到RMSNorm初始化方案，在权重衰减诱导的近零均值激活条件下被证明是最优的；(iii) Cross-architecture Knowledge Distillation (XKD) 采用等规模的冻结教师模型进行知识蒸馏，使转换后的模型输出在任意合理输入分布上与源模型对齐。
AI.result: Llamion在H6、MT-Bench和KoMMLU上有效恢复了Orion-14B的行为，仅需约1.23亿token和单张A100 GPU（四天）即可完成转换；Llamion-Base在KoMMLU上达到66.87%，提交时比Open Ko LLM Leaderboard的次优条目高出超过7.0个绝对百分点；迁移语料中完全未涉及的Python编程和20万token长上下文能力在架构转换后得以完整保留。
AI.conclusion: KEPT方法能够高效、低成本地将非标准架构的语言模型转换为标准化架构，同时保持甚至超越原有能力，且转换后的模型可与主流生态无缝兼容（trust_remote_code=False即可加载）；该工作表明，通过精心设计的参数映射和知识蒸馏策略，可以打破特定架构对模型应用的束缚，为开源模型的生态整合和复用提供了有效路径。

title: TempRet: Temporal Enhancement and Two-Stage Reranking for CVPR 2026 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge
comment: Technical Report for CVPR 2026 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge
summary: Video-text retrieval has witnessed remarkable progress driven by large-scale vision-language pretraining, yet most existing approaches inherit an implicit assumption from image-text retrieval: that visual semantics can be captured frame-by-frame. This assumption overlooks the temporal dynamics of egocentric videos. The EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval (MIR) challenge further raises the bar by providing soft-label relevance matrices rather than binary labels, demanding models that can resolve graded semantic correspondences across modalities. In this report, we present our solution, termed TempRet, to the CVPR 2026 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 MIR challenge. Our approach builds upon a CLIP-based dual-encoder backbone and introduces two key components to address the temporal and cross-modal challenges. First, a temporal transformer operates exclusively on the video side, modeling inter-frame dependencies through learnable positional encodings and multi-head self-attention over frame-level CLIP features. Second, a two-stage reranking pipeline first retrieves Top-K candidates via the dual-encoder, then refines their scores using a cross-encoder equipped with an Image-Text Matching (ITM) head. The entire system is trained with Symmetric Multi-Similarity Loss to exploit the soft-label relevance matrices provided by the challenge. Our method achieves 67.97% average mAP and 82.92% average nDCG on the EK-100 MIR benchmark, demonstrating the effectiveness of temporal modeling and cross-modal refinement for egocentric video retrieval.

AI.tldr: 提出TempRet方法，通过视频端时序Transformer和两阶段重排流水线解决第一人称视频中时序动态和软标签分级语义匹配问题，在EPIC-KITCHENS-100 MIR基准上达到67.97%平均mAP和82.92%平均nDCG。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-文本检索方法从图像-文本检索继承逐帧捕获视觉语义的隐含假设，忽略了第一人称视频的时序动态特性；同时EPIC-KITCHENS-100多实例检索挑战提供软标签相关性矩阵而非二值标签，要求模型具备分级语义跨模态对应能力，现有方法难以同时应对这两方面挑战。
AI.method: TempRet以CLIP双编码器为骨干，在视频端引入时序Transformer，通过可学习位置编码和多头自注意力建模帧级CLIP特征间的帧间依赖关系；同时设计两阶段重排流水线，先由双编码器检索Top-K候选，再使用配备图像-文本匹配头的跨编码器对候选进行分数精炼，整个系统采用对称多相似度损失以利用挑战提供的软标签相关性矩阵进行训练。
AI.result: 在EPIC-KITCHENS-100 MIR基准上，TempRet达到67.97%的平均mAP和82.92%的平均nDCG，验证了时序建模和跨模态精炼对第一人称视频检索的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，针对第一人称视频的时序动态特性构建专门的时序建模模块（如视频端时序Transformer），并结合两阶段重排策略进行跨模态评分精炼，能够有效提升视频-文本检索在软标签分级语义匹配场景下的性能，为第一人称视频理解提供了可借鉴的技术路线。

title: Benchmarking the Limits of In-Context Reinforcement Learning for Ad-Hoc Teamwork
summary: In-Context Reinforcement Learning (ICRL) has enabled foundation agents to adapt instantaneously to novel tasks, yet its efficacy in Ad-Hoc Teamwork (AHT)-where coordination with unknown partners is required-remains unexplored. To rigorously evaluate this, we introduce a large-scale benchmark ICRL4AHT, built upon a high-throughput JAX implementation of Overcooked-V2. Our benchmark includes a large, diverse teammate suite spanning both RL and heuristic policies, enabling controlled train-test shifts, and provides a reproducible end-to-end pipeline for teammate generation, learning-history collection, dataset construction, and online multi-episode evaluation. We evaluate representative history-conditioned ICRL algorithms, including Algorithm Distillation (AD) and Decision-Pretrained Transformer (DPT), across millions of transitions. Results reveal notable limitations: contrary to their success in single-agent domains, these baselines fail to exhibit robust test-time adaptation in multi-agent settings. Specifically, these methods frequently underperform random baselines across both unseen teammate and unseen layout tracks, with no clear in-context improvement over long horizons. These findings highlight the challenges of strategic inference under partial observability within the OvercookedV2 AHT protocol, establishing our benchmark as a critical testbed for next-generation coordination algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ICRL4AHT，一个基于Overcooked-V2的大规模基准测试，用于评估上下文强化学习在临时团队协作中的表现，发现现有ICRL算法在多人未知合作场景下无法实现有效的测试时自适应，甚至常逊于随机基线。
AI.motivation: 尽管上下文强化学习使基础智能体能够即时适应新任务，但其在临时团队协作中——即需与未知伙伴协调的场景——的有效性尚未被探索，现有研究对此缺乏系统的评估基准和方法验证。
AI.method: 基于JAX实现的高吞吐Overcooked-V2构建大规模基准ICRL4AHT，包含涵盖RL和启发式策略的多样化队友库，支持可控的训练-测试分布偏移，并提供完整的可复现流程用于队友生成、学习历史收集、数据集构建及在线多回合评估，采用包括Algorithm Distillation和Decision-Pretrained Transformer在内的代表性历史条件ICRL算法进行验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，现有ICRL基线在未知队友和未知布局两种测试轨道上频繁表现不如随机基线，且长时域内没有明显的上下文内改进，这与它们在单智能体领域的成功形成鲜明对比，揭示了多智能体设置下测试时自适应的显著局限。
AI.conclusion: 这些发现凸显了OvercookedV2临时团队协作协议中局部可观性下的策略推理挑战，将ICRL4AHT确立为下一代协调算法的关键测试平台。

title: PowLU: An Activation Function for Stable Pre-Training of LLMs
summary: In contemporary large language models (LLMs), the swish-gated linear unit (SwiGLU) activation function is widely adopted to regulate the information flow and introduce non-linearity. For large positive inputs, SwiGLU approximates the quadratic function $x^2$, providing strong nonlinearity and expressive capacity. However, this property also causes numerical instability as the input or model scale increases, particularly in low-precision LLM training. The main reason is its approximate quadratic amplification, which enlarges the output range and exacerbates outliers. To address this issue, we propose a stable activation function, Power Linear Unit (PowLU), for large-scale LLM pre-training. Specifically, PowLU employs a rational power function to achieve adaptive nonlinearity, thereby improving representation ability and enabling stable training in spike regions. Moreover, we provide theoretical justification for several key properties of PowLU. Scaling law experiments confirm that the performance is consistent across model sizes, and further experimental results with the Ling architecture (7.9B and 124B total parameters) demonstrate that PowLU achieves competitive results against SwiGLU and SwiGLU-Clip in large-scale training of LLMs. In addition, the experimental results also show that PowLU effectively improves the scalability of the large-scale training of LLMs.

AI.tldr: 针对SwiGLU在大规模低精度LLM训练中因近似二次函数放大导致数值不稳定的问题，提出Power Linear Unit (PowLU)激活函数，采用有理幂函数实现自适应非线性，在保持表达能力的同时提升训练稳定性，在7.9B和124B参数的Ling架构上取得了与SwiGLU及SwiGLU-Clip相当的性能，并有效改善了大规模训练的扩展性。
AI.motivation: SwiGLU激活函数在大正输入下近似于二次函数x²，虽然提供了强非线性和表达能力，但也会因近似二次放大效应扩大输出范围并加剧异常值，导致在低精度LLM训练中数值不稳定，这一问题随着输入或模型规模增大而愈发严重。
AI.method: 提出Power Linear Unit (PowLU)激活函数，采用有理幂函数实现自适应非线性，在尖峰区域实现稳定训练的同时提升表示能力，并给出了关键性质的理论证明。
AI.result: 缩放律实验验证了PowLU在不同模型规模下性能一致性；在Ling架构（7.9B和124B总参数量）上的大规模训练实验表明，PowLU取得了与SwiGLU和SwiGLU-Clip相当的结果，并有效提升了大规模LLM训练的扩展性。
AI.conclusion: PowLU通过有理幂函数设计的自适应非线性机制，能够在保持与SwiGLU相当表达能力的同时解决其数值不稳定性问题，为大规模低精度LLM训练提供了一种稳定且有效的激活函数替代方案。

title: Med-R2: An Adversarial Benchmark for Evidence-Grounded Reasoning in Medical VLMs
summary: Vision-language models have demonstrated impressive capabilities in general medical visual question answering, yet due to limited interpretability, it remains unclear whether their predictions reflect evidence-grounded clinical reasoning or reliance on spurious priors. We introduce Med-R2 Bench, a hierarchical benchmark aligned with the clinical workflow to evaluate adversarial robustness with visual grounding. We design stepwise QA tasks to assess whether reasoning chains are strictly grounded in visual evidence across the four clinical stages, and employ adversarial perturbations to test robustness against misleading cues. Med-R2 comprises 42,432 images, 31 task categories, and 110,406 QA pairs. Evaluation across 14 VLMs reveals a sequential performance degradation along the four-stage clinical workflow. Adversarial experiments show that models rely heavily on correct prompts to guess answers. Even when provided with explicit visual cues, the models struggle to accurately align textual descriptions. Finally, we demonstrate stepwise fine-tuning using our hierarchical data significantly improves reasoning robustness, highlighting its potential to drive future improvements in evidence-based medical AI.

AI.tldr: Med-R2 Bench是一个面向医学视觉语言模型的层次化对抗鲁棒性基准，通过分级QA任务和对抗扰动评估模型在临床推理链中是否真正基于视觉证据，实验发现模型存在顺序性能退化、严重依赖提示猜测答案以及难以对齐文本与视觉线索的问题，而层次化微调可显著提升推理鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉语言模型在通用医学视觉问答中表现出色，但由于可解释性有限，无法判断其预测是源于基于证据的临床推理，还是依赖于虚假的先验关联（spurious priors），亟需一个能够评估模型推理过程是否严格基于视觉证据的基准。
AI.method: 提出了Med-R2 Bench，一个与临床工作流对齐的层次化基准，包含42,432张图像、31个任务类别和110,406个QA对，设计覆盖四个临床阶段的分步QA任务来评估推理链是否严格基于视觉证据，并引入对抗性扰动来测试模型面对误导性线索时的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在14个视觉语言模型上的评估显示，沿四阶段临床工作流存在顺序性的性能退化；对抗实验表明模型严重依赖正确的提示来猜测答案，即便提供了明确的视觉线索，模型仍难以准确地将文本描述与视觉信息对齐。
AI.conclusion: 利用层次化数据进行分步微调可以显著提升模型的推理鲁棒性，这表明Med-R2 Bench具有推动基于证据的医学AI未来发展的潜力。

title: AgentFugue: Agent Scaling for Long-Horizon Tasks through Collective Reasoning
summary: Recent progress on long-horizon agentic tasks has been driven largely by scaling up individual agents through stronger models, better tools, and more effective scaffolding. In contrast, much less is understood about scaling out: whether multiple peer agents, all targeting the same task, can become an additional source of capability without relying on explicit role specialization or workflow orchestration. We study this question and propose AgentFugue, a collective reasoning framework built around a shared reasoning hub. As peer agents explore the same task in parallel, the hub records concise notes on what each agent has established, attempted, or ruled out, and enables each agent to selectively access what other agents have discovered in a form useful for its current search. This design turns otherwise isolated trajectories into a connected ecology of reusable intermediate reasoning without requiring centralized planning. We instantiate the hub as a plug-in communication layer, trained with supervised fine-tuning and end-to-end reinforcement learning. Across the challenging long-horizon settings we study, AgentFugue improves over strong baselines. Our results suggest that collective reasoning can turn scaling out peer agent systems into a distinct source of capability gains, rather than merely a way of spending more compute.

AI.tldr: AgentFugue 提出一种集体推理框架，通过共享推理中心让多个对等智能体并行探索同一任务时共享中间推理结果，从而将横向扩展（scaling out）从单纯增加算力转变为独立的能力增益来源。
AI.motivation: 现有长程自主任务的研究主要聚焦于通过更强的模型、工具和架构来纵向扩展单个智能体，但对于横向扩展（多个对等智能体并行处理同一任务）能否成为独立的能力增益来源缺乏深入理解，尤其是无需显式角色分工或工作流编排的机制。
AI.method: 提出 AgentFugue 框架，其核心是一个共享推理中心（shared reasoning hub），多个对等智能体并行探索任务时，中心记录每个智能体已建立、尝试或排除的推理笔记，并允许其他智能体选择性访问这些信息以辅助当前搜索；该中心作为可插拔的通信层，通过监督微调和端到端强化学习训练。
AI.result: 在多个具有挑战性的长程任务设定中，AgentFugue 相比强基线方法取得了显著改进，证明了集体推理能够将横向扩展转变为独立的能力提升来源，而不仅仅是消耗更多算力的方式。
AI.conclusion: 集体推理机制可以有效利用多个对等智能体的并行探索，将原本孤立的轨迹转化为互联的可复用中间推理生态，为提升长程自主任务性能提供了无需集中规划的新范式。

title: Mitigating Provenance-Role Collapse in Long-Term Agents via Typed Memory Representation
summary: Long-term memory is essential for persistent LLM agents, yet prevailing architectures store historical interactions as unstructured, flat text. This unconstrained storage induces provenance-role collapse, a critical failure mode where agents suffer from source-monitoring errors. To resolve this cognitive vulnerability at the architectural level, we propose MemIR, a typed Memory Intermediate Representation that operationalizes source monitoring as a structural constraint. MemIR writes long-term memory into grounded atoms that separate raw evidence, retrieval cues, and truth-bearing claims, with factual authorization restricted to supported claim atoms. It then applies multi-route atomic projection and provenance-scoped utilization to transform heterogeneous retrieval hits into claim-centered candidate bundles and a normalized fact interface for answer generation. Experiments on LoCoMo and BEAM-100K demonstrate that MemIR consistently outperforms existing memory baselines, especially on tasks requiring source tracking, temporal grounding, and aggregation of fragmented evidence.

AI.tldr: MemIR提出了一种类型化记忆中间表示，通过在架构层面引入源监控作为结构约束，将长期记忆组织为带有证据、检索线索和事实主张的接地原子，从而解决无结构存储导致的溯源角色崩溃问题，在LoCoMo和BEAM-100K基准上显著优于现有记忆方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM智能体的长期记忆架构将历史交互存储为无结构的扁平文本，导致溯源角色崩溃这一关键失效模式，即智能体在需要使用记忆时会出现源监控错误，无法正确区分证据来源、检索线索与事实主张之间的差异，从而影响回答的可靠性和可追溯性。
AI.method: MemIR通过定义类型化记忆中间表示来将源监控操作化为结构约束：它将长期记忆写为由原始证据、检索线索和承载真实性声明三种接地原子组成的结构化形式，仅允许受支持的声明原子获得事实授权；在读取阶段采用多路径原子投影和溯源范围利用，将异构检索结果转化为以声明为中心的候选束，并输出归一化的事实接口用于答案生成。
AI.result: 在LoCoMo和BEAM-100K基准上的实验表明，MemIR在需要源追踪、时间定位和碎片证据聚合的任务上持续且显著地优于现有记忆基线方法，验证了通过结构约束解决源监控问题的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MemIR从架构层面证明了将认知科学中的源监控机制作为结构化约束融入记忆系统设计的可行性，为构建具有持久可靠记忆的LLM智能体提供了新的设计范式，尤其适用于对证据溯源和时序推理有高要求的应用场景。

title: EgoAdapt: A Multi-Scene Egocentric Adaptation Method for CVPR 2026 HD-EPIC VQA Challenge
comment: Technical Report for CVPR 2026 HD-EPIC VQA Challenge
summary: This technical report presents our solution, EgoAdapt (Egocentric Adaptation via Category, Calibration, and Consistency), to the CVPR 2026 HD-EPIC VQA challenge. HD-EPIC evaluates whether a vision-language model can reason over realistic first-person kitchen videos, where the evidence for an answer may be a short hand-object interaction, a long recipe trajectory, a spatial relation to a fixture, or a subtle gaze cue. The benchmark contains 26K multiple-choice questions across seven macro-categories: recipe, ingredient, nutrition, fine-grained action, 3D perception, object motion, and gaze. We observe that the main difficulty is not only model capacity, but also the mismatch between a single generic inference recipe and the heterogeneous temporal, spatial, and semantic structure of the benchmark. Our method, EgoAdapt, introduces three inference-time components: (1) category-conditioned routing with per-category prompts, frame budgets, and sampling rates; (2) calibrated option scoring that evaluates all candidate answers with letter-token likelihoods and generation agreement instead of relying only on direct generation; and (3) test-time consistency adaptation that aggregates predictions across option permutations and verification-style prompts for ambiguous cases. This design substantially improves over the available HD-EPIC baselines.

AI.tldr: EgoAdapt 提出了一种针对第一人称视频 VQA 挑战的推理时自适应方法，通过类别条件路由、校准选项评分和测试时一致性适应，有效解决了异构时序、空间和语义结构带来的推理不匹配问题，大幅超越现有基线。
AI.motivation: HD-EPIC 基准测试中的第一人称厨房视频 VQA 问题具有高度异构性——答案证据可能是短程手物交互、长程菜谱轨迹、空间关系或细微视线线索，但现有方法采用单一通用推理策略，无法匹配这种时空与语义结构的多样性，导致模型能力与基准需求之间存在严重错配。
AI.method: EgoAdapt 包含三个推理时组件：(1) 类别条件路由，为每个宏类别配置独立的提示词、帧预算和采样率；(2) 校准选项评分，通过字母标记似然和生成一致性评估所有候选答案，而非仅依赖直接生成；(3) 测试时一致性适应，在歧义情况下聚合不同选项排列和验证式提示下的预测结果。
AI.result: 该方法在 CVPR 2026 HD-EPIC VQA 挑战赛中显著提升了性能，大幅超越了现有的 HD-EPIC 基线模型，证明了推理时自适应策略相较于单一通用推理流程的有效性。
AI.conclusion: EgoAdapt 表明，针对第一人称视频 VQA 问题，关键瓶颈不仅在于模型容量，更在于推理策略与异构任务结构之间的匹配；通过推理时类别自适应、校准评分和一致性聚合，可以在不改变模型参数的情况下显著提升视觉-语言模型的跨场景推理能力。

title: Market Regime Council for Dynamic Credit Assignment in Multi-Agent LLM Decision Systems
summary: Multi-agent LLM decision systems for portfolio management still lack a principled way to assign credit across specialist agents, remain vulnerable to cold-start dominance under regime shifts, and offer limited transparency into how final allocations are formed. We propose Market Regime Council (MRC), a cooperative multi-agent decision system that computes exact Shapley credits across all single, pairwise, and Grand-coalition outputs for online agent weighting. Instantiated with N=3 specialist agents, at each trading period, MRC recomputes coalition-based Shapley weights from exponentially weighted performance histories, uses a Bayesian adaptive mixture to stabilize early periods, applies regime-dependent multipliers to adjust agent authority, and records each rebalance through a five-layer causal trace. Over 1,037 trading days across 13 crypto assets and five seeds, MRC achieves a Sharpe ratio of 1.51 and a cumulative return of 440.1%, ranking first on CR, SR, and IR among active baselines and attaining the lowest MDD among active methods. Ablation results show that the gains come from Shapley-weighted integration across coalition outputs rather than from any single stage in isolation. Code and demo data are included in the supplementary material.

AI.tldr: 本文提出市场机制委员会（MRC），一个基于精确Shapley值在线加权与贝叶斯自适应混合的多智能体协作决策系统，在加密货币投资组合管理任务中实现1.51的夏普比率和440.1%的累计收益，较现有主动基线方法在收益、夏普比率和信息比率上均排名第一。
AI.motivation: 现有基于多智能体LLM的投资组合决策系统存在三个关键缺陷：缺乏在专业智能体间进行信用分配的原则性方法；在市场机制切换时易受冷启动主导效应影响；最终资产配置的形成过程缺乏透明可解释性。
AI.method: MRC是一个包含N=3个专业智能体的协作式多智能体决策系统，核心机制包括：在每个交易周期基于指数加权的历史表现重新计算所有单智能体、两两组合及大联盟输出的Shapley信用值以进行在线权重分配；采用贝叶斯自适应混合机制稳定早期训练阶段；施加基于市场机制的动态乘数以调节各智能体权威性；每次再平衡操作通过五层因果链路进行完整记录。
AI.result: 在涵盖13种加密货币资产、1037个交易日的实验中，经五种随机种子验证，MRC取得了1.51的夏普比率和440.1%的累计收益率，在累计收益、夏普比率和信息比率三项指标上均位列所有主动基线方法之首，同时实现了主动方法中最低的最大回撤。消融实验表明，性能提升源于跨联盟输出的Shapley加权集成，而非任何单一阶段。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证实了基于Shapley值的精确信用分配与自适应混合机制在多智能体LLM投资组合决策中的有效性，为提升系统透明度、鲁棒性和跨市场机制适应性提供了可行方案，代码与演示数据已作为补充材料开源。

title: Universal Activation Verbalizer: A Unified Framework for Cross-Model Activation Explanation
summary: Activation verbalization explains hidden representations in natural language, but existing methods are mostly limited to self-explanation, where each model explains only its own activations. We introduce Universal Activation Verbalizer (UAV), a framework that uses a shared decoder to explain activations from heterogeneous donor models. UAV learns a lightweight adapter that converts donor activations into soft tokens in decoder's embedding space, and further supports adapter-only transfer by reusing a frozen decoder-side LoRA while training only a new adapter for another donor. Across classification, fact retrieval, and gist summarization, UAV remains competitive with strong self-explanation baselines while enabling cross-model verbalization across model families and scales. Ablations show that decoder-side tuning mainly improves task behavior, whereas the adapter provides the activation-grounded factual and semantic information needed for faithful explanations.

AI.tldr: 提出通用激活语言化器（UAV），利用共享解码器与轻量适配器解释来自异构捐赠模型的隐藏表示，支持跨模型家族和跨规模的激活语言化，性能与强自解释基线相当。
AI.motivation: 现有激活语言化方法大多局限于自解释（self-explanation），即每个模型只能解释自身的激活表示，缺乏跨模型、跨家族的通用解释能力，这限制了可解释性方法的泛化性和迁移效率。
AI.method: UAV框架由一个共享解码器和轻量适配器组成：适配器将异构捐赠模型的激活表示转换为解码器嵌入空间中的软令牌（soft tokens），从而支持跨模型语言化；此外，通过冻结解码器端的LoRA参数并仅训练新适配器，实现仅适配器（adapter-only）的迁移学习。
AI.result: 在分类、事实检索和要点摘要任务上，UAV在跨模型家族和跨规模场景下均能与强自解释基线保持竞争力；消融实验表明，解码器端调优主要改善任务行为，而适配器提供基于激活的事实与语义信息以保证解释的忠实性。
AI.conclusion: UAV证明了利用共享解码器实现通用激活语言化的可行性，揭示了适配器在跨模型解释中承载激活接地信息的关键作用，为可解释性研究中跨模型迁移和高效解释提供了新范式。

title: FoodMonitor: Benchmarking MLLMs for Explainable Compliance Analysis
summary: As AI-powered compliance monitoring becomes increasingly important in public governance and industrial safety, the ability to provide verifiable evidence and traceable accountability signals is essential. However, existing video anomaly detection datasets focus on event-level binary classification, lacking the rule-driven, explainable analysis required for real-world compliance scenarios. We introduce FoodMonitor, a benchmark for explainable compliance analysis in commercial kitchen surveillance. FoodMonitor comprises 477 video clips with 3,307 violation annotations across a dual-channel design covering both person-level and environment-level violations. Each annotation specifies which rule was violated, what non-compliant behavior occurred, and who committed it with frame-level bounding boxes. We establish a unified evaluation protocol with a two-stage matching mechanism that separately assesses spatial localization and semantic understanding, along with a composite metric ($C_{\text{score}}$) that balances environment and person detection performance. Systematic evaluation of several state-of-the-art multimodal large language models reveals that the best-performing model achieves only 0.360 $C_{\text{score}}$, with spatial localization and fine-grained rule understanding emerging as the primary bottlenecks. Our analysis identifies two distinct failure modes: localization-dominated errors and semantics-dominated errors, providing diagnostic insights for future model development.

AI.tldr: FoodMonitor是一个面向商业厨房监控的合规分析基准数据集，包含477个视频片段和3307条违规标注，覆盖人员与环境两级违规，通过双阶段匹配机制和复合指标系统评估多模态大语言模型，揭示当前最优模型仅取得0.360的C_score分数，空间定位与细粒度规则理解是主要瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有视频异常检测数据集仅关注事件级二分类，缺乏以规则为驱动、可解释的合规分析能力，无法满足公共治理和工业安全场景中对可验证证据和可追溯问责信号的实际需求。
AI.method: FoodMonitor采用双通道标注设计，涵盖人员级与环境级两类违规行为，每条标注包含违规规则、非合规行为描述及责任人信息并附带帧级边界框；提出统一评估协议，包含两阶段匹配机制分别评估空间定位与语义理解能力，并设计了复合指标C_score来平衡环境检测与人员检测性能。
AI.result: 对多种最先进多模态大语言模型的系统评估显示，最佳模型仅达到0.360的C_score分数，其中空间定位和细粒度规则理解是主要性能瓶颈；分析识别出两类不同的失败模式——定位主导型错误和语义主导型错误。
AI.conclusion: FoodMonitor揭示了当前多模态大语言模型在可解释的规则驱动合规分析任务中的显著不足，空间定位与细粒度语义理解是制约性能的核心瓶颈，两类失败模式的识别为未来模型开发提供了诊断性指导方向。

title: Reasoning as an Attack Surface: Adaptive Evolutionary CoT Jailbreaks for LLMs
summary: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in reasoning and generation tasks and are increasingly deployed in real-world applications. However, their explicit chain-of-thought (CoT) mechanism introduces new security risks, making them particularly vulnerable to jailbreak attacks. Existing approaches often rely on static CoT templates to elicit harmful outputs, but such fixed designs suffer from limited diversity, adaptability, and effectiveness. To overcome these limitations, we propose an adaptive evolutionary CoT jailbreak framework, called AE-CoT. Specifically, the method first rewrites harmful goals into mild prompts with teacher role-play and decomposes them into semantically coherent reasoning fragments to construct a pool of CoT jailbreak candidates. Then, within a structured representation space, we perform multi-generation evolutionary search, where candidate diversity is expanded through fragment-level crossover and a mutation strategy with an adaptive mutation-rate control mechanism. An independent scoring model provides graded harmfulness evaluations, and high-scoring candidates are further enhanced with a harmful CoT template to induce more destructive generations. Extensive experiments across multiple models and datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed AE-CoT, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art jailbreak methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应进化思维链越狱框架AE-CoT，通过将有害目标重写为温和提示、分解为语义连贯的推理片段，并利用片段级交叉与自适应变异率控制的进化搜索策略生成多样化CoT越狱候选，结合分级有害性评估与有害CoT模板增强，在多个模型和数据集上持续超越现有越狱方法。
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型(LRM)的显式思维链(CoT)机制引入新的安全风险，使其易受越狱攻击。现有方法依赖静态CoT模板生成有害输出，存在多样性不足、适应性差和有效性有限的问题，亟需一种能够自适应生成多样化CoT越狱候选的框架以有效暴露LRM的安全漏洞。
AI.method: AE-CoT框架首先通过教师角色扮演将有害目标重写为温和提示，并将其分解为语义连贯的推理片段以构建CoT越狱候选池；然后在结构化表示空间中执行多代进化搜索，通过片段级交叉和自适应变异率控制策略扩展候选多样性；使用独立评分模型进行分级有害性评估，高评分候选进一步通过有害CoT模板增强以诱导更具破坏性的生成结果。
AI.result: 在多个模型和数据集上的大量实验表明，AE-CoT框架持续优于现有的最先进越狱方法，其自适应进化搜索策略显著提升了CoT越狱攻击的多样性、适应性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: LRM的显式推理机制虽然增强了推理能力，但也暴露出新的安全脆弱性；自适应进化搜索策略能够有效利用CoT结构进行越狱攻击，揭示了当前推理模型安全对齐的不足，为后续防御研究提供了重要参考。

title: Can LLMs Time Travel? Enhancing Temporal Consistency in Legal Agentic Search through Reinforcement Learning
summary: While large language models (LLMs) augmented with agentic search capabilities show promise for legal reasoning, they overlook a fundamental constraint that applicable law must match the temporal context of each case, as retroactive application of statutes violates core legal principles and leads to erroneous conclusions. Our observations reveal that current legal LLMs suffer from temporal bias anchored to their training cutoff, while search agents rarely incorporate temporal constraints into queries, and that web search alone cannot provide the precise statute and precedent citations that legal reasoning demands. To address these challenges, we propose LegalSearch-R1, an end-to-end reinforcement learning framework that pairs local statute RAG for precise article matching with online web search for broader legal knowledge, trained on temporally-indexed data spanning multiple amendment periods to enforce temporal consistency. Extensive experiments on our benchmark covering 13 legal tasks demonstrate that our 7B-parameter agent outperforms state-of-the-art deep research frameworks and specialized legal LLMs by 12.9% to 29.8%, surpasses baselines by 57.7% to 80.3% on temporal consistency, and exhibits robust out-of-domain generalization. The code and data are available at https://github.com/AlexFanw/LegalSearch-R1.

AI.tldr: LegalSearch-R1是一个基于端到端强化学习的法律搜索框架，通过结合本地法规RAG与在线网络搜索，并使用时序索引数据训练，有效解决了大语言模型在法律推理中的时间偏差问题，在13个法律任务上以7B参数超越最先进方法12.9%-29.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有法律大语言模型存在时间偏差，模型结果锚定于训练截止日期，搜索智能体在查询中缺乏时间约束，且仅靠网络搜索无法提供法律推理所需的精确法规与判例引用——这些局限导致模型可能将非当前有效的法律溯及适用于当前案件，违反核心法律原则并得出错误结论。
AI.method: 提出LegalSearch-R1，一个端到端强化学习框架，采用双源检索策略：本地法规RAG负责精准条款匹配，在线网络搜索负责获取更广泛的法律知识；模型在跨越多个修正周期的时序索引数据上进行训练，以强制执行时间一致性。
AI.result: 在覆盖13个法律任务的基准测试上，7B参数的LegalSearch-R1相比最先进的深度研究框架和专用法律LLM提升12.9%-29.8%，时间一致性指标超越基线57.7%-80.3%，并展现出强大的跨域泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过强化学习框架融合本地法规检索与网络搜索，并在时序数据上训练，能够有效消除法律推理中的时间偏差，显著提升模型在法律任务上的准确性与时效合规性，且小规模模型即可超越更大规模的专用系统。

title: FDDet: Achieving Data-Efficient Food Defect Detection Under Real-World Scenarios
summary: Food defect detection is critical for automated quality control, yet existing studies lack unified benchmarks and suffer from data scarcity. We introduce FDD-48, a comprehensive dataset with fine-grained annotations across 13 food types and 48 defect categories under diverse real-world conditions. To improve detection with limited labeled data, we propose FDDet, a semi-supervised framework featuring two key components: (1) BBoxMixUp, a data augmentation technique that mixes same-category defect regions to reduce spurious feature associations, and (2) CGPC (Consistency-Guided Pseudo-Label Calibration), which filters pseudo-labels based on intra-sample consistency. Experiments show FDDet significantly outperforms mainstream detectors on FDD-48, demonstrating its effectiveness for food defect detection under data-limited scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了FDD-48数据集和FDDet半监督检测框架，通过BBoxMixUp数据增强和CGPC伪标签校准技术，有效解决了食品缺陷检测中数据稀缺和缺乏统一基准的问题，在少样本场景下显著优于主流检测器。
AI.motivation: 现有食品缺陷检测研究缺乏统一基准数据集，且面临标注数据稀缺的严重问题，导致模型难以在真实条件下泛化。
AI.method: FDDet半监督框架包含两个关键组件：(1) BBoxMixUp，一种将同类别缺陷区域混合的数据增强方法，用于减少虚假特征关联；(2) CGPC（一致性引导的伪标签校准），通过样本内一致性过滤伪标签，提升半监督学习质量。
AI.result: 在自建的FDD-48数据集（涵盖13种食品类型、48种缺陷类别，具有细粒度标注和多样化真实条件）上，FDDet显著优于主流检测器，验证了其在数据受限场景下食品缺陷检测的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过统一基准数据集和专用半监督框架，为数据稀缺条件下的食品缺陷检测提供了有效解决方案，表明基于数据增强和伪标签校准的半监督策略是该领域具有前景的研究方向。

title: Jailbreak to Protect: Buffering and Reinforcing via Temporary Jailbreaking for Safe Fine-Tuning in Large Language Models
summary: Fine-tuning-as-a-Service (FaaS) enables personalization of large language models (LLMs), but it can weaken safety-alignment under harmful fine-tuning attacks. Recent work has shown that activating harmful-behavior modules during fine-tuning can prevent models from learning undesired behaviors, but its mechanism remains unclear. In this paper, we revisit temporary jailbreaking as a defense against harmful fine-tuning and provide a gradient-level analysis showing that it saturates safety-degrading gradients while preserving benign task-relevant gradients. Based on this insight, we propose a Buffer-and-Reinforce fine-tuning framework that buffers harmful updates during user fine-tuning and reinforces safety after adaptation. Specifically, BufferLoRA induces temporary jailbreaking as a removable adapter to reduce harmful updates during user fine-tuning. After adaptation, ReinforceLoRA, trained to recover refusal behavior under the temporarily jailbroken state, is integrated with UserLoRA via QR decomposition-based merging to reinforce safety while preserving user-task performance. Extensive experiments show that our framework achieves superior safety and utility with no additional safety data during user fine-tuning and minimal computational cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Buffer-and-Reinforce 微调框架，通过临时越狱机制在用户微调期间缓冲有害梯度并事后强化安全对齐，在不依赖额外安全数据与低计算开销下实现优于现有方法的安全性与任务性能。
AI.motivation: 微调即服务（FaaS）在实现大语言模型个性化时可能被有害微调攻击削弱安全对齐，现有基于激活有害行为模块的防御方法虽有效但其机制尚不明确，亟需在理论上解释其作用原理并据此设计更高效、安全且实用的防御框架。
AI.method: 本文从梯度层面分析临时越狱防御机制，发现其通过饱和安全退化梯度同时保留良性任务相关梯度来发挥作用；基于此提出 Buffer-and-Reinforce 框架：BufferLoRA 在用户微调阶段作为可移除适配器诱导临时越狱以缓冲有害更新，ReinforceLoRA 在适应后训练以在临时越狱状态下恢复拒绝行为，并通过 QR 分解合并与 UserLoRA 集成以在强化安全的同时保持用户任务性能。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该框架在用户微调过程中无需额外安全数据且计算成本极低的情况下，实现了优于现有方法的安全性与任务效用，验证了梯度层面分析的正确性与框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了临时越狱防御有害微调的本质在于梯度饱和机制，并基于此设计了高效的两阶段微调框架，为 FaaS 场景下安全与性能的平衡提供了新思路；未来可进一步探索该梯度分析对其他微调安全问题的适用性。

title: PolyGnosis 2.0: Enhancing LLM Reasoning via Agentic Harness Engineering for Polymarket and OSINT Insight Extraction
summary: This paper introduces PolyGnosis 2.0, a pioneering multi-agent architecture designed to extract predictive intelligence by synthesizing Polymarket anomaly signals with global Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) streams, specifically Global Database of Events, Language, and Tone (GDELT). We define and target "Perspective Mismatches", the narrative divergence between Polymarket sentiment and global media flows, as high-alpha trading signals. Moving beyond generic agentic superiority, we rigorously quantify the efficacy of "Harness Engineering" techniques, including reflection loops, tool-calling, divide-and-conquer partitioning (D&C), and chain-of-thought (CoT), within high-noise financial domains. Our empirical evaluation against human-expert benchmarks reveals that while structural partitioning is mandatory for multi-dimensional alignment, unconstrained terminal reflection actively induces logical drift. Furthermore, we identify a pervasive "consensus bias" across all agent configurations during narrative reasoning, necessitating deterministic validation. Ultimately, we isolate a Pareto-optimal configuration that achieves professional-grade analytical precision while minimizing latency and token overhead, providing a robust blueprint for autonomous intelligence in prediction markets.

AI.tldr: PolyGnosis 2.0 提出一种多智能体架构，通过融合 Polymarket 异常信号与 GDELT 全球开源情报流，提取"视角错配"作为高 alpha 交易信号，并系统量化了反思循环、工具调用、分治分区与思维链等"利用工程"技术在金融噪声环境中的有效性，最终找到在精度、延迟与算力开销之间达到帕累托最优的配置方案。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多从通用智能体优越性角度探讨多智能体系统，缺乏针对金融高噪声领域内具体工程技术的量化对比，同时预测市场中的叙事分歧（即 Polymarket 情绪与全球媒体流之间的视角错配）尚未被有效利用为可交易的预测信号。
AI.method: 提出 PolyGnosis 2.0 多智能体架构，将 Polymarket 异常信号与 GDELT 全球开源情报流进行协同合成；系统引入"利用工程"技术，包括反思循环、工具调用、分治分区与思维链，并在人类专家基准下进行严格的实证对比评估，以此量化各技术对分析精度、延迟和 token 开销的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现，结构化的分治分区对多维信号对齐是必需的，而无限制的终端反思会主动引发逻辑漂移；所有智能体配置在叙事推理中均存在"共识偏差"，需要确定性验证加以纠正；最终获得的帕累托最优配置在达到专业级分析精度的同时，有效控制了延迟与 token 开销。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为预测市场中的自主智能体设计提供了可复用的工程蓝图，强调了在金融高噪声环境下必须审慎选择智能体工程策略，尤其应避免过度依赖反思机制，并引入确定性验证以对抗共识偏差。

title: PEDESTRIANQA: A Benchmark for Vision-Language Models on Pedestrian Intention and Trajectory Prediction
summary: Pedestrian intention and trajectory prediction are critical for the safe deployment of autonomous driving systems, directly influencing navigation decisions in complex traffic environments. Recent advances in large vision-language models offer a powerful new paradigm for these tasks by combining high-capacity visual understanding with flexible natural language reasoning. In this work, we introduce PedestrianQA, a large-scale video-based dataset that formulates pedestrian intention and trajectory prediction as question-answering tasks augmented with structured rationales. PedestrianQA expresses richly annotated pedestrian sequences, in natural language, enabling VLMs to learn from visual dynamics, contextual cues, and interactions among traffic agents while generating concise explanations of their predictions without needing specialized architectures tailored for each task. Empirical evaluations across PIE, JAAD, TITAN, and IDD-PeD show that finetuning state-of-the-art VLMs on PedestrianQA significantly improves intention classification, trajectory forecasting accuracy, and the quality of explanatory rationales, demonstrating the strong potential of VLMs as a unified and explainable framework for safety-critical pedestrian behavior modeling.

AI.tldr: PedestrianQA 是一个大规模视频问答数据集，将行人意图和轨迹预测建模为带有结构化推理过程的问答任务，使得微调后的大视觉语言模型能够在无需专用架构的情况下统一完成预测和可解释性生成，在多个基准上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有行人意图与轨迹预测方法通常依赖为每个任务定制的专用架构，缺乏统一且可解释的框架；同时，大视觉语言模型虽然展现出强大的多模态理解与语言推理能力，但尚未被系统性地应用于行人行为预测这一安全关键任务，缺乏相应的数据集与范式支持。
AI.method: 本文提出 PedestrianQA 大规模视频数据集，将行人意图分类与轨迹预测形式化为视觉问答任务，并为每段行人序列提供自然语言标注、结构化推理过程和上下文解释。基于该数据集，对现有大视觉语言模型进行微调，使其能够在单一框架下同时完成意图识别、轨迹预测与可解释性生成，无需为不同预测任务设计专用网络结构。
AI.result: 在 PIE、JAAD、TITAN 和 IDD-PeD 四个公开数据集上的实验表明，在 PedestrianQA 上微调后的大视觉语言模型在意图分类准确率、轨迹预测精度以及解释性推理质量上均取得显著提升，验证了大视觉语言模型作为统一可解释框架在安全关键行人行为建模中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了大视觉语言模型能够通过统一框架同时执行行人意图预测、轨迹推理和自然语言解释，无需专用架构；PedestrianQA 数据集为该范式提供了关键数据支持，为推动可解释、安全关键的行人行为建模提供了新方向。

title: HeartBeatAI: An Interpretable and Robust Deep Learning Framework for Multi-Label ECG Arrhythmia Detection
summary: While Deep Learning (DL) enhances automated electrocardiogram (ECG) analysis, clinical deployment is hindered by class imbalance and the generalization gap. This paper presents HeartBeatAI, a deep learning framework combining domain generalization, multi-scale feature aggregation, and clinical explainability for robust 12-lead ECG classification. Moving beyond image-based paradigms, HeartBeatAI integrates a Squeeze-and-Excitation (SE) ResNet to isolate diagnostic leads alongside a Multi-Layer Concentration Pipeline to capture macro-rhythm and micro-morphological anomalies. To mitigate domain shift, the framework employs MixStyle regularization and Label Smoothing. Rigorous benchmarking across four large-scale datasets using intra-source and Leave-One-Domain-Out (LODO) protocols demonstrates high performance (98% Macro F1-score) under intra-source conditions. However, LODO evaluations reveal significant degradation in detecting rare anomalies, highlighting a persistent challenge in cross-institutional deployment.

AI.tldr: HeartBeatAI是一个结合域泛化、多尺度特征聚合与临床可解释性的深度学习框架，用于12导联ECG分类，在源域内达到98% Macro F1-score，但在跨机构场景下检测罕见异常时性能显著下降。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在自动心电图分析中性能优异，但临床部署受限于类别不平衡和域迁移导致的泛化差距，现有方法在跨机构场景下对罕见异常检测能力不足，亟需兼顾鲁棒性与可解释性的解决方案。
