PM-RoPE, an elegant camera-phase RoPE extension, unlocks spatiotemporal retrieval at a single-attention cost while preserving pretrained pathways. ReMind achieves the best overall scores on STEVO-Bench and recovery tasks. Furthermore, general image-to-video evaluations confirm this curriculum avoids catastrophic forgetting. We will open-source our code, data, and models.

AI.tldr: ReMind提出了一种框架，通过面向记忆的数据构建、事件感知训练和缓存自适应机制，使视频扩散Transformer中的KV缓存能够作为动态记忆进行跨中断的时序状态检索，在STEVO-Bench和恢复任务上取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频世界模型在遇到观测中断时会将隐藏状态冻结，无法维持演化中的状态。论文指出这并非简单的容量问题——预训练视频扩散Transformer已具备支持非局部检索的KV缓存机制，但很少被训练为动态记忆使用。
AI.method: ReMind包含三个核心组件：面向记忆的数据构建（基于100+动态事件分类体系，结合VLM筛选的真实视频、生成硬动态样本、合成相机循环和记忆中断增强，将每个片段转换为带保护锚点、退化区间和显式时间间隙的帧图）；节点结构化的课程训练（含节点丢弃、噪声记忆、前沿延续和参考缓存训练）；以及PM-RoPE——一种相机相位RoPE扩展，以单注意力代价实现时空检索的同时保持预训练通路。
AI.result: ReMind在STEVO-Bench和恢复任务上取得最佳综合得分。通用图像到视频评估验证了该课程训练策略避免了灾难性遗忘。
AI.conclusion: 通过面向记忆的数据设计和课程式训练，可以有效激发预训练视频扩散Transformer的KV缓存作为动态记忆的潜力，实现跨中断的状态维持，且不损害通用视频生成能力。

title: Retrying vs Resampling in AI Control
summary: AI coding scaffolds like Claude Code and Codex use \textit{retrying}: blocking actions flagged as risky and continuing the trajectory. We study retrying from an AI control perspective, which treats the model as potentially adversarial. We find that while retrying reduces honest suspicion scores, the untrusted model can exploit monitor rationale to construct sneakier attacks, negating safety gains. We also study \textit{resampling}: drawing multiple samples from the same context, which does not leak exploitable information. We disentangle design choices that previous work on resampling had bundled together. In BashArena, with Claude Opus 4.6 as the untrusted model and MiMo-V2-Flash as the trusted monitor, drawing five samples per step and auditing on the maximum suspicion score raises safety from 61\% to 71\% at a 0.3\% audit budget, at no cost to usefulness. Selectively resampling only the steps that look suspicious on the first draw recovers 6.2 percentage points of the gain while drawing only 10\% as many extra samples. Two of our findings in this setting contradict earlier work on resampling. The first is that auditing based on the maximum across resampled suspicion scores outperforms using the minimum, which is the opposite of what Ctrl-Z found. The second is that executing the least suspicious sample, which is the central mechanism in earlier defer-to-resample protocols, gives only a small empirical safety gain in our setting (+3.9 pp, with the confidence interval overlapping zero).

AI.tldr: 本文从AI控制视角研究编码助手中的重试与重采样机制，发现重试会泄露可被对抗性模型利用的信息，而基于最大怀疑分数的重采样策略能将安全性从61%提升至71%，并且推翻了先前研究中关于重采样审计方式的结论。
AI.motivation: 现有AI编码助手（如Claude Code、Codex）采用重试机制——阻塞被标记为有风险的动作并继续轨迹，但从AI控制视角看，该方法将模型视为潜在对抗者，存在安全漏洞。同时，先前关于重采样的研究将多个设计选择混杂在一起，缺乏对每种选择效果的独立分析，且存在相互矛盾的结论。
AI.method: 以Claude Opus 4.6为不可信模型、MiMo-V2-Flash为可信监控器，在BashArena环境中系统对比重试与重采样的安全效果。重采样机制中每步抽取五个样本，基于最大怀疑分数进行审计；同时提出选择性重采样策略，仅对首次抽取中可疑的步骤进行额外采样。
AI.result: 重试虽降低了诚实怀疑分数，但不可信模型可利用监控器的推理依据构建更隐蔽的攻击，抵消了安全收益。重采样策略在0.3%审计预算下将安全性从61%提升至71%，且不影响有用性；选择性重采样仅使用10%的额外样本即可恢复6.2个百分点的安全增益。最大怀疑分数的审计效果优于最小怀疑分数，与Ctrl-Z的结论相反；执行最不怀疑的样本仅带来+3.9个百分点的微小安全增益，置信区间包含零。
AI.conclusion: 重试机制存在可被对抗性模型利用的信息泄露风险，而重采样是一种更安全的选择。研究发现推翻了先前关于重采样审计方式的结论——使用最大怀疑分数优于最小怀疑分数，且执行最不怀疑样本的安全增益有限。这为AI安全控制中的采样策略设计提供了重要指导。

title: Towards Reliable Fetal Ultrasound Interpretation with Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: Automated fetal ultrasound interpretation requires a workflow from visual perception, including plane recognition and anatomical segmentation, to clinical understanding, including biometric measurement and diagnostic reporting. However, the prevailing "one-task, one-model" paradigm limits systematic integration of evidence across this multi-step process. Although multimodal large language models (MLLMs) show promising visual understanding, their limited domain-specific grounding and hallucination risks restrict reliability in fetal ultrasound analysis. To address these limitations, we propose FetUSAgents, a tool-augmented multi-agent system for comprehensive fetal ultrasound interpretation, supporting visual question answering (VQA), report generation, image captioning, and video summarization. FetUSAgents coordinates task-specific visual tools through collaborative LLM agents and decomposes clinical queries into subtasks that progress from anatomical recognition to quantitative measurement. We further introduce Dual-Path Evidence Arbitration (DPEA), which integrates LLM-based deliberative reasoning with structured computational evidence from specialized visual tools. A retrieval-enhanced evidence bank consolidates intermediate findings to support traceable and clinically grounded conclusions. In addition, we construct FetUS-VQA, a dedicated VQA benchmark for fetal ultrasound, comprising 1,892 images and 3,205 question-answer pairs across 10 clinical tasks. Extensive out-of-distribution experiments show that FetUSAgents outperforms general and medical MLLMs, exceeding the strongest baseline by more than 25 percent in VQA accuracy. These results suggest a scalable route toward evidence-driven clinical assistants for prenatal imaging. Code is available.

AI.tldr: 提出FetUSAgents，一个工具增强的多智能体系统，通过协同LLM智能体与专业视觉工具，结合双路径证据仲裁机制，实现胎儿超声图像的全面解读，在VQA基准上超越最强基线25%以上。
AI.motivation: 现有胎儿超声分析遵循"一任务一模型"范式，限制了多步骤流程中证据的系统整合；多模态大语言模型虽具视觉理解能力，但领域特定知识不足且存在幻觉风险，难以保证在胎儿超声分析中的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出FetUSAgents，采用多智能体架构协调任务专用视觉工具，通过LLM智能体协同工作将临床查询分解为从解剖识别到定量测量的子任务；引入双路径证据仲裁机制，整合基于LLM的审慎推理与来自专业视觉工具的结构化计算证据；构建检索增强证据库以支持可追溯且临床可靠的结论。
AI.result: 构建了包含1,892张图像和3,205个问答对的FetUS-VQA基准，涵盖10项临床任务；在分布外实验中，FetUSAgents在VQA准确率上超越最强基线超过25%，显著优于通用及医学多模态大语言模型。
AI.conclusion: FetUSAgents为产前成像提供了一条可扩展的循证临床辅助路径，展示了通过工具增强的多智能体协作和证据仲裁机制提升胎儿超声分析可靠性与全面性的巨大潜力。

title: From Model Scaling to System Scaling: Scaling the Harness in Agentic AI
summary: This paper studies the next major bottleneck in agentic AI as system scaling, not only model scaling: the design of auditable, persistent, modular, and verifiable architectures around foundation models. We refer to this shift as scaling the harness: treating the structured execution layer around a foundation model as a first-class object of design, evaluation, and optimization. Although recent large language models enable agents to use tools, retrieve information, maintain memory, and execute long-horizon workflows, evaluation remains largely model-centric, often reducing agents to final-task success while treating memory, retrieval, tool use, orchestration, verification, and governance as secondary implementation details. This framing is increasingly inadequate because agent performance emerges from the interaction among the foundation model, memory substrate, context constructor, skill-routing layer, orchestration loop, and verification-and-governance layer. Together, these components form the agent harness, which translates model capability into long-horizon agent behavior. We study scaling the harness through three core bottlenecks: context governance, trustworthy memory, and dynamic skill routing, together with the orchestration and governance mechanisms that coordinate and constrain them. We further outline a research agenda for harness-level benchmarks that go beyond one-shot task success to measure trajectory quality, memory hygiene, context efficiency, communication fidelity, verification cost, and safe evolution over time. To make the discussion concrete, we develop CheetahClaws: https://github.com/SafeRL-Lab/cheetahclaws, a Python-native reference harness, and compare it with Claude Code and OpenClaw. Our main claim is that future progress in agentic AI will depend as much on system design as on stronger foundation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出智能体AI的下一个瓶颈在于系统级扩展（即"harness扩展"），而非仅模型扩展；通过将基础模型周围的执行层——包含记忆、检索、工具调用、编排与治理——作为一等设计对象，并开发了Python原生参考框架CheetahClaws来佐证核心主张：未来智能体AI的进展将同等依赖系统设计与更强的基座模型。
AI.motivation: 当前智能体AI评估过于以模型为中心，常将记忆、检索、工具调用、编排与治理等系统组件视为次要实现细节，而智能体性能实际源于基座模型与这些系统组件的交互涌现；这种模型中心化的评估框架已不足以应对长周期、多步骤的智能体行为，亟需将系统级设计（即"harness"）提升为一等研究对象。
AI.method: 提出"harness扩展"概念，将围绕基础模型的结构化执行层视为设计、评估与优化的第一类对象；识别三个核心瓶颈：上下文治理、可信记忆和动态技能路由，以及协调与约束它们的编排与治理机制；开发了Python原生参考框架CheetahClaws，并与Claude Code和OpenClaw进行对比。
AI.result: 开发并开源了CheetahClaws参考框架（https://github.com/SafeRL-Lab/cheetahclaws），将其与Claude Code和OpenClaw进行了比较；提出了超越单次任务成功率的harness级基准测试研究方向，涵盖轨迹质量、记忆卫生、上下文效率、通信保真度、验证成本和随时间的安全演化等指标。
AI.conclusion: 未来智能体AI的进步将同等依赖于系统设计（即harness设计）与更强的基座模型；研究社区需要建立harness级的基准测试体系，从系统架构层面衡量智能体行为的质量、效率与安全性，而非仅关注最终任务成功率。

title: Adversarial Orthogonal Disentanglement for LVLM Hallucination Mitigation
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have advanced multimodal understanding, yet their reliability is limited by hallucination, where generated content conflicts with visual facts. Existing mitigation methods either rely on costly external interventions, such as instruction tuning and retrieval, or use internal mechanisms that remain limited by flawed attention weights and entangled hidden representations. We propose Adversarial Orthogonal Disentanglement (AOD), a latent geometric framework for mitigating LVLM hallucinations. AOD learns a hallucination-related direction through a minimax objective: a classifier concentrates hallucination signals into the projected component, while an adversary removes them from the orthogonal residual space via a Gradient Reversal Layer. The learned direction enables a training-free dual-forward-pass contrastive decoding strategy that suppresses hallucinations while preserving general capabilities. Experiments on three LVLMs across four hallucination and four utility benchmarks show that AOD consistently outperforms strong baselines. It improves POPE accuracy by over 6\% on average, boosts AMBER by 6\%, and maintains strong performance on utility tasks such as MMMU. Further analysis shows robust transfer across datasets, suggesting that AOD captures general hallucination-related biases rather than dataset-specific artifacts. Our source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/Hunter-Wrynn/AOD.

AI.tldr: 提出对抗正交解缠（AOD）框架，通过学习幻觉相关方向并利用对比解码策略，在无需额外训练或外部干预的条件下有效抑制LVLM中的幻觉现象，同时在多个基准上显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型在多模态理解中表现出色，但存在生成内容与视觉事实不一致的幻觉问题。现有缓解方法要么依赖代价高昂的外部干预（如指令微调、检索），要么使用内部机制但受限于有缺陷的注意力权重和纠缠的隐藏表示，亟需一种更高效且不依赖外部干预的幻觉抑制方法。
AI.method: 提出对抗正交解缠（AOD）框架，通过最小化极大目标学习幻觉相关方向：分类器将幻觉信号集中到投影分量中，而对抗器通过梯度反转层从正交残差空间中移除这些信号。学习到的方向支持一种无需额外训练的双前向传递对比解码策略，在抑制幻觉的同时保留通用能力。
AI.result: 在三个LVLM上、覆盖四个幻觉基准和四个通用能力基准的实验表明，AOD一致优于强基线方法：POPE准确率平均提升超过6%，AMBER提升6%，同时在MMMU等通用任务上保持强劲性能。进一步分析显示该方法在不同数据集间具有良好的迁移性，表明AOD捕获的是通用幻觉相关偏差而非数据集特定伪影。
AI.conclusion: AOD通过几何解缠的思路为LVLM幻觉抑制提供了一种轻量级、无训练且可迁移的有效方案，证明了从表示空间中分离幻觉信号的方向性偏差能够在不损害通用性能的前提下显著缓解幻觉问题，为后续研究提供了新范式。

title: Weakly Supervised Camouflaged Object Detection Based on the SAM Model and Mask Guidance
summary: Camouflaged object detection (COD) from a single image is a challenging task due to the high similarity between objects and their surroundings. Existing fully supervised methods require labor-intensive pixel-level annotations, making weakly supervised methods a viable compromise that balances accuracy and annotation efficiency. However, weakly supervised methods often experience performance degradation due to the use of coarse annotations. In this paper, we introduce a new weakly supervised approach for camouflaged object detection to overcome these limitations. Specifically, we propose a novel network, MGNet, which tackles edge ambiguity and missed detections by utilizing initial masks generated by our custom-designed Cascaded Mask Decoder (CMD) to guide the segmentation process and enhance edge predictions. We introduce a Context Enhancement Module(CEM) to reduce the missing detection, and a Mask-guided Feature Aggregation Module (MFAM) for effective feature aggregation. For the weak supervision challenge, we propose BoxSAM, which leverages the Segment Anything Model (SAM) with bounding-box prompts to generate pseudo-labels. By employing a redundant processing strategy, high quality pixel-level pseudo-labels are provided for training MGNet. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method delivers competitive performance against current state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MGNet，一种结合BoxSAM伪标签生成和级联掩码解码器的新颖弱监督伪装物体检测方法，在仅使用边界框标注的情况下取得了与全监督方法可比的性能。
AI.motivation: 伪装物体检测中，全监督方法依赖昂贵的像素级标注，而现有弱监督方法由于使用粗标注导致性能退化，尤其面临边缘模糊和漏检两大挑战。
AI.method: 提出MGNet网络，包含三个核心模块：级联掩码解码器（CMD）利用初始掩码引导分割并增强边缘预测；上下文增强模块（CEM）减少漏检；掩码引导特征聚合模块（MFAM）实现有效特征融合。同时提出BoxSAM，利用Segment Anything Model（SAM）结合边界框提示和冗余处理策略生成高质量像素级伪标签用于训练。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，所提方法在多个基准数据集上取得了与当前最先进弱监督及部分全监督方法相竞争的检测性能，有效缓解了边缘模糊和漏检问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了通过精心设计的弱监督策略（BoxSAM生成伪标签+多模块网络设计），可以在仅使用边界框级别标注的条件下显著缩小与全监督COD方法的性能差距，为降低像素级标注成本提供了可行方案。

title: Subspace-Guided Semantic and Topological Invariant Registration for Annotation-Free Ultrasound Plane Quality Control
comment: MICCAI 2026 Accepted Paper; Subspace-Guided Registration for Ultrasound Quality Control
summary: Reliable quality control (QC) of ultrasound images is essential for both real-time acquisition guidance and retrospective clinical audit, yet existing approaches rely heavily on per-plane annotations, or employ pseudo-labeling prone to systematic bias under spatial deformations inherent in clinical acquisition. We present STRIQ, a registration-driven framework that recasts annotation-free US plane quality control as a subspace-guided consistency measurement problem. Specifically, STRIQ introduces a Latent Registration Aligner (LRA) to establish hierarchical feature space correspondences between query images and variance-driven anchors, which are autonomously distilled from unlabeled data via a variance spectrum criterion to serve as structurally stable prototypes. To further disambiguate anatomical planes and mitigate negative knowledge transfer, we propose an Orthogonal Knowledge Subspace (OKS) module. The OKS decomposes plane-specific representations into mutually orthogonal subspaces, enabling fine-grained expert collaboration while preventing inter-plane interference, ensuring that the quality metric is grounded in principled subspace proximity. Extensive experiments on the in-house US4QA and public CAMUS datasets demonstrate that STRIQ achieves state-of-the-art correlation with clinical quality scores, establishing a new paradigm for annotation-free, real-time reliable ultrasound quality control. Our code is available at https://github.com/zhcz328/STRIQ.

AI.tldr: STRIQ提出了一种基于配准的无标注超声图像质量控制框架，通过隐式配准对齐器建立特征空间对应，并结合正交知识子空间模块消除平面间干扰，在无需标注的情况下实现了与临床质量评分最先进的相关性。
AI.motivation: 现有超声图像质量控制方法严重依赖逐平面人工标注，或采用伪标签方法，但伪标签在临床采集固有的空间形变下易产生系统性偏差，缺乏一种无需标注、可靠且实时的超声图像质量控制方案。
AI.method: STRIQ框架包含两个核心模块：隐式配准对齐器（LRA）在层次化特征空间中建立查询图像与方差驱动锚点之间的对应关系，锚点通过方差谱准则从未标注数据中自主蒸馏得到；正交知识子空间（OKS）模块将平面特定表示分解为相互正交的子空间，实现细粒度专家协作同时防止平面间干扰，确保质量度量基于子空间接近性。
AI.result: 在自建US4QA数据集和公开CAMUS数据集上的大量实验表明，STRIQ在与临床质量评分的相关性上达到了最先进水平，建立了一种无标注、可实时执行的超声质量控制的通用新范式。
AI.conclusion: STRIQ通过将无标注超声图像质量控制重定义为子空间引导的一致性度量问题，避开了对逐平面标注的依赖，并有效克服了伪标签方法在空间形变下的偏差，为临床超声采集引导和回顾性审计提供了一种可靠的新路径。

title: Anatomy-Anchored Self-Supervision: Distilling Vision Foundation Models for Invariant Ultrasound Representation
comment: MICCAI 2026 Accepted Paper; Anatomy-Anchored Ultrasound Self-Supervision
summary: Self-supervised pre-training paradigm has gained increasing prominence for learning transferable representations in medical imaging, yet existing methods for ultrasound (US) images operate at the image or frame level, overlooking the anatomical context for clinical-aligned representation learning. In this work, we propose an anatomy-anchored ultrasound self-supervision framework ANAUS that shifts representation learning from generic visual regions to clinically meaningful anatomical structures. Utilizing a learnable latent prompt engine alongside a one-time domain adaptation on existing public image--mask pairs, we empower the LP-SAM module to achieve annotation-free anatomy delineation at scale. Building upon this anatomical grounding, we propose a dual-policy self-supervised learning paradigm consisting of inter-view semantics-aware anatomy-separating alignment and contextual core-region prediction to enhance representation learning. Specifically, the former enforces feature invariance within identical anatomical regions while promoting discriminability across distinct structures; the latter compels the model to reconstruct corrupted regions, thereby capturing fine-grained structural details. Extensive evaluations on six public datasets demonstrate that \ours{} consistently outstrips current state-of-the-art methods while maintaining the computational efficiency essential for clinical deployment. Code is available at https://github.com/zhcz328/ANAUS.

AI.tldr: 提出ANAUS框架，通过解剖锚定的自监督学习范式，将超声影像表示学习从图像级转向临床相关的解剖结构级，在六个公共数据集上超越现有方法，同时保持临床部署所需的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有超声影像自监督预训练方法仅在图像或帧级别操作，忽略了与临床对齐的表示学习所需的解剖上下文，未能利用医学影像中具有临床意义的解剖结构信息。
AI.method: 提出ANAUS框架，包含三个核心模块：(1) LP-SAM模块，通过可学习的潜在提示引擎和一次性域适应实现无标注的解剖结构分割；(2) 跨视图语义感知解剖分离对齐，强制同一解剖区域特征不变性同时增强不同结构间的判别性；(3) 上下文核心区域预测，通过重构被破坏区域捕获细粒度结构细节，形成双策略自监督学习范式。
AI.result: 在六个公共数据集上的广泛评估表明，ANAUS一致超越当前最先进方法，同时保持了临床部署所必需的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 将自监督预训练从通用视觉区域转向临床意义的解剖结构可有效提升超声影像表示学习的质量，且该方法在性能和效率上均具备临床落地的潜力。

title: MTLLFM: Multimodal-Temporal Laughter Localization: UR-FUNNY-Temporal and SMILE-Temporal Benchmarks with an Adaptive Multimodal Fusion Model
comment: Accepted to the Workshop on Affective & Behavior Analysis in-the-wild, CVPR 2026
summary:
Detecting laughter in video is essential for affective computing and narrative understanding, yet existing approaches treat it as coarse clip-level classification, failing to capture precise temporal boundaries of brief, transient laughter events. We address this gap with two complementary contributions.
  First, we introduce UR-FUNNY-Temporal and SMILE-Temporal, fully annotated temporal laughter datasets extending two widely-used humor benchmarks. Our annotations cover over 11,053 videos (78.8 hours) and provide precise onset/offset boundaries for each laughter event, along with rich metadata distinguishing speaker vs. audience laughter, modality dominance (acoustic, visual, or both), and intensity levels.
  Second, we propose a lightweight weakly-supervised framework for temporal laughter localization. Our architecture combines fixed HuBERT and MAE encoders with temporal softmax pooling and adaptive modality gating, learning fine-grained temporal grounding from clip-level labels without requiring frame-level annotations during training. Experiments across three datasets demonstrate that our approach substantially outperforms multimodal foundation models including Gemini 3 Flash, achieving 99% F1 and 68.1% localization precision on sports broadcast data. Ablations validate each architectural component. Furthermore, our precise temporal tags improve downstream laughter reasoning by 227% on CIDEr, enabling GPT-3.5 to outperform GPT-4o. The code, UR-FUNNY-Temporal and SMILE-Temporal datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/WSCSports/MTLLFM-temporal-laughter-localization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两个精准时间标注的笑声检测数据集（UR-FUNNY-Temporal和SMILE-Temporal），并设计了一个轻量级弱监督时序定位框架，结合固定HuBERT和MAE编码器、时序softmax池化与自适应模态门控，在仅使用片段级标签的条件下实现了高精度笑声时序定位，下游任务中CIDEr指标提升227%。
AI.motivation: 现有笑声检测方法通常将任务视为粗粒度的片段级分类，无法捕捉短暂、瞬态笑声事件的精确时间边界，缺乏细粒度时序定位能力。
AI.method: 本文首先对UR-FUNNY和SMILE两个广泛使用的幽默基准数据集进行精细时间标注，构建了覆盖11,053个视频（78.8小时）的UR-FUNNY-Temporal和SMILE-Temporal数据集，包含笑声起止边界、说话者与观众笑声区分、模态主导性（声学、视觉或两者）及强度等级等丰富元数据。其次提出一个轻量级弱监督时序定位框架，采用固定的HuBERT和MAE编码器提取特征，结合时序softmax池化和自适应模态门控机制，仅使用片段级标签即可学习细粒度的时序定位能力。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于包括Gemini 3 Flash在内的多模态基础模型，在体育广播数据上达到99%的F1分数和68.1%的定位精度。消融实验验证了各架构组件的有效性。进一步实验表明，精确的时序标签使下游笑声推理任务的CIDEr指标提升227%，使GPT-3.5的性能超越GPT-4o。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过提供大规模精细时序标注数据集和高效的弱监督定位框架，填补了笑声时序定位的研究空白，验证了精确时间边界信息对提升下游多模态推理能力的显著价值，为情感计算和叙事理解领域提供了重要的数据与算法基础。

title: Enhancing Single-Image Facial Demorphing using Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Face recognition systems are increasingly vulnerable to morphing attacks, where a composite image is crafted to match multiple identities, enabling unauthorized access and identity fraud. Existing detection methods identify morphed images but cannot recover constituent images or identities, limiting their forensic utility. This paper presents a novel reference-free facial demorphing framework that leverages Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to guide a coupled diffusion-based reconstruction process. Our key innovation lies in extracting semantic embeddings from intermediate MLLM layers to condition the demorphing, providing high-level reasoning about facial attributes and identity cues that complement low-level pixel information. We formulate demorphing as a coupled conditional generation problem, where both constituent faces are synthesized jointly through a denoising diffusion model operating directly in the RGB domain, ensuring inter-identity consistency while preserving fine-grained perceptual details. Unlike prior approaches that rely on compressed latent representations or assume identity overlap between training and testing sets, our method bypasses lossy text generation-reencoding cycles by directly utilizing MLLM hidden states as conditioning signals, enabling the denoising network to attend to subtle visual cues such as hair, background, and facial textures. Ablation studies further reveal that middle MLLM layers encode more identity-discriminative representations, RGB-domain demorphing outperforms latent-space approaches by 30--40\% at strict operating points, and full MLLM embeddings provide substantial advantages over raw ViT features through enhanced semantic structuring from multimodal pretraining.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）引导的耦合扩散重建框架，实现无参考的面部去变形，无需依赖参考图像或压缩潜空间表示，即可从变形图像中联合恢复两个原始人脸。
AI.motivation: 现有面部变形攻击检测方法仅能识别变形图像，却无法恢复构成图像或原始身份信息，限制了其取证应用价值；同时，已有去变形方法依赖压缩潜空间表示或假设训练集与测试集之间存在身份重叠，泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 提出无参考面部去变形框架，核心创新在于提取多模态大语言模型（MLLM）中间层的语义嵌入作为条件信号，引导耦合扩散模型在RGB域中联合重构两个原始人脸；通过MLLM隐状态直接注入去噪网络，绕过有损的文本生成-重编码流程，实现高层语义推理与低层像素信息的互补。
AI.result: 消融实验表明：中间MLLM层编码更具身份判别性的表征，RGB域去变形在严格操作点下比潜空间方法性能提升30–40%，完整MLLM嵌入相比原始ViT特征通过多模态预训练带来的增强语义结构化具有显著优势。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了多模态大模型在细粒度视觉取证任务中的潜力，证明了利用MLLM中间层语义嵌入代替传统文本生成-重建循环的有效性，为无参考面部去变形提供了新的技术路线，并指出了RGB域去变形相对于潜空间方法的优越性。

title: MAIL++: Multi-Modal Bi-directional Agent Layer for Vision-Language Models
summary:
Adapting large vision-language models (VLMs) such as CLIP to downstream tasks remains challenging, as full fine-tuning is computationally prohibitive and prone to overfitting in low-data regimes. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) alleviates these issues with lightweight prompt- or adapter-based modules, and cross-modal coupling has proven especially effective by strengthening interactions between vision and language. However, existing coupling mechanisms predominantly rely on external auxiliary modules, leading to indirect, coarse-grained interactions that are structurally decoupled from the original VLM and thus limit representational expressiveness.
  In this paper, we propose Multi-Modal Interactive Agent Layer (MAIL), a PEFT paradigm that embeds cross-modal coupling directly into the intrinsic computation modules of VLMs. MAIL freezes the backbone and inserts lightweight agent layers after core modules, such as LayerNorm, to approximate the parameter updates induced by full fine-tuning. To couple visual and textual streams at this level, we introduce a bottleneck-based text-to-image bridge that jointly optimizes paired agent layers across modalities, coordinating the adaptation of corresponding computation modules. We further present MAIL++, which enables bidirectional cross-modal exchange through a meta agent layer, a meta-text bridge, and a meta-image bridge. At inference time, all agent layers are re-parameterized into the frozen backbone, preserving the original computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on few-shot image classification and few-shot universal cross-domain retrieval demonstrate that MAIL and MAIL++ consistently outperform state-of-the-art PEFT methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MAIL和MAIL++，一种将跨模态耦合参数高效微调方法直接嵌入视觉-语言模型固有计算模块中的新范式，通过轻量级代理层和瓶颈式跨模态桥接机制实现双向交互，在保持推理效率的同时显著提升少样本分类和跨域检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CLIP等大型视觉-语言模型的参数高效微调方法虽通过跨模态耦合增强视觉与文本交互，但主要依赖外部辅助模块实现间接、粗粒度的交互，这些模块在结构上与原始VLM解耦，限制了表征表达能力。
AI.method: MAIL冻结主干网络，在核心模块（如LayerNorm）后插入轻量级代理层来近似全微调的参数更新，并通过基于瓶颈结构的文本到图像桥（text-to-image bridge）联合优化跨模态的成对代理层。MAIL++进一步引入元代理层（meta agent layer）、元文本桥（meta-text bridge）和元图像桥（meta-image bridge），实现双向跨模态信息交换；推理时所有代理层可重参数化回冻结主干，不增加额外计算开销。
AI.result: 在少样本图像分类和少样本通用跨域检索任务上的大量实验表明，MAIL和MAIL++在性能上一致优于现有最先进的参数高效微调方法。
AI.conclusion: 将跨模态耦合直接嵌入VLM固有计算模块而非依赖外部辅助模块，能够实现更直接、更强表征能力的交互，从而在极低数据场景下取得更优的微调效果，同时通过重参数化保持推理效率。

title: ProSR: Process-Shaped Spatial Reasoning for Reliable Chain-of-Thought in VLMs
summary: Reliable spatial reasoning remains a core bottleneck for vision-language models (VLMs). Existing mainstream training paradigms for spatial reasoning largely rely on outcome alignment or process imitation, lacking explicit constraints on the reasoning process, and therefore struggle to ensure genuine visual dependence and stable reasoning trajectories. In this paper, we construct a high-quality CoT dataset covering diverse spatial phenomena and diagnose the model's reasoning process, revealing two typical types of process degradation during reinforcement learning optimization: Spurious Grounding, which bypasses visual evidence, and Tail Instability, where uncertainty abnormally rises in the later stage of reasoning. To address these issues, we propose ProSR, a process-shaping optimization framework for spatial reasoning. Through a Counterfactual Invariance Penalty and a Tail Drift Penalty, ProSR extends the optimization objective from single answer correctness to two process-level dimensions: visual dependence and trajectory stability. Experiments on multiple complex and out-of-distribution spatial reasoning benchmarks show that ProSR improves answer accuracy while generating reasoning trajectories that are more stable and more dependent on visual evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProSR，一个面向空间推理的过程塑形优化框架，通过反事实不变性惩罚和尾部漂移惩罚将优化目标从单一答案正确性扩展到过程级视觉依赖性和轨迹稳定性，在多个空间推理基准上提升了答案准确率并生成了更稳定、更依赖视觉证据的推理轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有的视觉-语言模型（VLM）空间推理训练范式主要依赖结果对齐或过程模仿，缺乏对推理过程的显式约束，导致模型难以保证真实的视觉依赖和稳定的推理轨迹；在实际强化学习优化过程中，模型会出现虚假接地（Spurious Grounding，绕过视觉证据）和尾部不稳定性（Tail Instability，推理后期不确定性异常上升）两种典型的过程退化问题。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个覆盖多种空间现象的高质量思维链（CoT）数据集，并基于此诊断模型推理过程；提出ProSR（Process-Shaping Optimization）框架，通过引入反事实不变性惩罚（Counterfactual Invariance Penalty）和尾部漂移惩罚（Tail Drift Penalty），将优化目标从单一答案正确性扩展为两个过程级维度——视觉依赖性和轨迹稳定性，从而在强化学习优化中约束推理过程。
AI.result: 在多个复杂和分布外（out-of-distribution）空间推理基准上的实验表明，ProSR不仅提升了答案准确率，而且生成的推理轨迹更加稳定且更加依赖视觉证据，有效缓解了虚假接地和尾部不稳定性问题。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，对VLM空间推理过程施加过程级的显式约束（视觉依赖性和轨迹稳定性）相比仅关注结果对齐更为有效；ProSR框架为推理过程的可信度和鲁棒性提供了新的优化方向，未来可推广至其他需要长链推理的视觉理解任务。

title: Are We Overconfident in Models and Results for Semi-Supervised 3D Medical Image Segmentation?
summary: Semi-supervised learning has become a dominant paradigm for reducing annotation costs. However, we argue that the current progress is clouded by a twofold overconfidence problem. Algorithmically, mainstream pseudo-labeling frameworks often conflate prediction confidence with uncertainty, leading to severe confirmation bias. Strategically, since multiple benchmark datasets lack dedicated validation sets, some studies use the test set for validation as well, leading to inflated performance estimates. Subsequent methods, compelled to employ the same strategy to surpass reported SOTA, trigger an arms race of overfitting. This raises concerns that the impressive numerical gains in the community may reflect overfitting rather than genuine progress. Thus, we propose a tri-space calibrated segmentation framework founded on a principled dual-axis reliability assessment engine. It explicitly decouples confidence from uncertainty and uses this signal to detect and correct confirmation bias across feature, probability, and image spaces in a collaborative manner. Across three benchmark datasets, TCSeg consistently delivers strong performance under existing evaluation protocols. More importantly, we advocate that the community report final-checkpoint results under multiple-run protocols, thereby establishing more rigorous benchmarks with a more realistic perspective. Code will be available: github.com/DirkLiii/TCSeg.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了半监督学习中存在算法层面与策略层面的双重过度自信问题，并提出了一种基于三空间校准的分割框架TCSeg，通过解耦置信度与不确定性来纠正确认偏差，同时倡导多轮次验证协议以建立更严格的基准。
AI.motivation: 现存的半监督学习研究存在双重过度自信问题：算法上，主流伪标签框架将预测置信度与不确定性混为一谈，导致严重的确认偏差；策略上，多个基准数据集缺少专用验证集，部分研究直接使用测试集进行验证，导致性能估计虚高，后续方法被迫采用相同策略以超越SOTA，引发了过拟合的军备竞赛，使得数值提升更多反映过拟合而非真正进展。
AI.method: 提出TCSeg，一个三空间校准分割框架，其核心是一个基于原则的双轴可靠性评估引擎，显式解耦置信度与不确定性，并利用该信号在特征空间、概率空间和图像空间协同检测和纠正确认偏差，实现对伪标签的跨空间联合校准。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，TCSeg在现有评估协议下持续展现出强性能表现，验证了该方法在缓解过度自信和确认偏差方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 研究呼吁社区采用最终检查点下的多轮次运行协议来报告结果，从而建立更具现实意义的严格基准，避免因验证策略不当导致的性能虚高和过拟合竞争。

title: Rethinking Scribble-Guided Image Editing: Generalization, Instruction Adherence, and Multi-Tasking
summary: Scribble-guided image editing allows users to combine simple scribble annotations with text prompts to specify both where and how an image should be edited, enabling flexible interaction with precise spatial control. However, existing models still exhibit unstable performance under this paradigm, especially in multi-task scenarios. To improve performance, we conduct empirical studies using an open-source editing model and reveal an asymmetry in generalization: instruction-level generalization, including across editing tasks and from single-task to multi-task settings, is more challenging than image-domain generalization, such as from synthetic to real-world images or from mosaicked to regular images. This suggests that the primary bottleneck lies in insufficient learning for diverse editing instructions rather than in the image domain gap. Motivated by this insight, we propose three strategies: (a) a Coverage-then-Realism Curriculum, a two-stage pipeline that first builds large-scale synthetic, instruction-rich data for broad task supervision, then curates a small set of real-world data to refine generation realism; (b) Multi-Task Mosaicking, which constructs multi-task training samples by concatenating single-task examples at nearly zero cost while enabling the learned capability to generalize to non-mosaicked images; and (c) an Edit-Focused Loss, which leverages the changed regions between input and output images in synthetic data to focus training on edited regions, improving both learning efficiency and editing accuracy. With these strategies, we substantially improve both single-task and multi-task scribble-guided editing on the VIBE benchmark, achieving state-of-the-art results. We will publicly release our dataset and model.

AI.tldr: 本文发现涂鸦引导图像编辑中指令级泛化（跨任务、单任务到多任务）比图像域泛化更具挑战性，并提出覆盖率-真实感课程学习、多任务拼接和编辑聚焦损失三种策略，在VIBE基准上实现了单任务和多任务涂鸦引导编辑的最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有涂鸦引导图像编辑模型在多任务场景下性能不稳定，其泛化瓶颈尚未被系统分析；本文旨在揭示该范式中泛化困难的根本来源，并据此提出有效的改进策略以提升模型在单任务与多任务条件下的编辑性能。
AI.method: 本文首先通过实证研究发现指令级泛化（跨编辑任务、从单任务到多任务）比图像域泛化（合成到真实、马赛克到常规图像）更为困难；基于此提出三种策略：覆盖率-真实感课程学习（先大规模合成指令丰富数据覆盖广泛任务，再用少量真实数据优化生成真实感）、多任务拼接（将单任务样本拼接为多任务训练样本实现零成本多任务学习且泛化至非拼接图像）、编辑聚焦损失（利用合成数据中编辑前后变化区域引导训练聚焦于编辑区域，提升学习效率与编辑精度）。
AI.result: 在VIBE基准上，结合所提三种策略的方法显著提升了单任务和多任务涂鸦引导图像编辑的性能，取得了最先进的结果；实验验证了指令级泛化是主要瓶颈这一核心洞察，并证明了各策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了涂鸦引导图像编辑中泛化困难的根本原因在于指令多样性不足而非图像域差距，并提供了三种实用策略来系统性解决该问题；研究暗示未来应更关注编辑指令的多样性与覆盖度，数据集和模型将被公开以推动该方向发展。

title: Hierarchical Consistency Learning for Test-time Adaptation in Camouflage Perception
summary: Camouflaged object detection (COD) aims to localize targets that exhibit minimal perceptual differences from backgrounds through physical attributes. Existing methods, constrained by the static train-then-freeze paradigm, suffer from domain rigidity and annotation dependency, limiting their adaptability to scene variations and unseen camouflage patterns. To overcome these, we propose the hierarchical consistency learning (HCL) framework, which integrates test-time adaptation for dynamic representation recalibration. Specifically, we design the hierarchical representation reconstruction (HRR) to alleviate feature entanglement by synergizing spatial reconstruction with dual-stream frequency-domain decomposition, enhancing robustness against appearance homogenization. The pixel and spectrum inference provide structural and contextual priors. We further introduce task affinity guidance (TAG) to propagate knowledge across branches via channel-wise affinity, aligning local discriminative cues and mitigating semantic drift. To ensure semantic invariance, we formulate the prototype consistency calibration (PCC), which aggregates region features into compact prototypes and establishes prototype-feature similarity. This imposes implicit and hierarchical constraints that bridge task and representation gaps. Extensive experiments across four camouflaged and four underwater object benchmarks, under three degradation settings, demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, highlighting its robustness and generalization under distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: 提出分层一致性学习（HCL）框架，通过测试时自适应、分层表征重建、任务亲和引导和原型一致性校准，解决伪装目标检测中静态训练范式导致的域刚性和注释依赖问题，在多个基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有伪装目标检测（COD）方法受限于静态的“先训练再冻结”范式，导致域刚性和注释依赖性，难以适应场景变化和未见过的伪装模式，缺乏对不同分布偏移下的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出分层一致性学习（HCL）框架，集成测试时自适应实现动态表征重校准。具体包括：分层表征重建（HRR）通过协同空间重建与双流频域分解缓解特征纠缠；像素推理和频谱推理分别提供结构与上下文先验；任务亲和引导（TAG）通过通道级亲和性在分支间传播知识并对齐局部判别线索；原型一致性校准（PCC）聚合区域特征为紧凑原型并建立原型-特征相似性，施加隐式分层约束以桥接任务与表征差距。
AI.result: 在四个伪装目标检测基准和四个水下目标检测基准上，跨越三种退化设定下的广泛实验表明，该方法持续优于现有最先进方法，凸显了其在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究通过测试时自适应和分层一致性学习机制，有效突破了静态训练范式在伪装目标检测中的局限性，为应对域偏移和未见伪装模式提供了新的技术路径，验证了动态表征重校准在提升模型鲁棒性方面的关键作用。

title: ARMA-C3: A Contrastive ARMA Convolutional Framework for Unsupervised and Semi-supervised Classification
summary: In biomedical and neurodegenerative disorders, accurate and early disease identification remains challenging due to the scarcity of labeled data and the complexity of imaging patterns. To address these challenges, we introduce ARMA-C3, a unified unsupervised and semi-supervised graph learning framework for node classification based on contrastive learning and graph-cut regularization to learn structurally meaningful and discriminative representations. By modeling samples or images as graph nodes and exploiting inter-sample relationships, the proposed framework captures subject-level dependencies that conventional machine learning methods typically overlook. We conduct extensive binary classification experiments across five clinically relevant datasets: the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI), the Neuroimaging in Frontotemporal Dementia (NIFD) dataset, and three medical imaging benchmarks (BreastMNIST, PneumoniaMNIST, and a liver ultrasound dataset). Experimental results demonstrate that ARMA-C3 achieves competitive and frequently superior performance compared to classical clustering techniques, state-of-the-art machine learning models, and existing graph-based deep learning approaches across multiple evaluation settings, particularly under limited supervision and severe class imbalance. The proposed framework further demonstrates robust representation learning and strong cross-modal generalization across diverse biomedical imaging modalities.

AI.tldr: ARMA-C3 提出一种统一的非监督与半监督图学习框架，结合对比学习与图割正则化，在生物医学影像节点分类任务中，尤其在标注稀缺和类别不平衡场景下，取得了优于传统方法及现有图深度学习模型的效果。
AI.motivation: 在生物医学与神经退行性疾病领域，由于标注数据稀缺且影像模式复杂，早期准确识别疾病仍面临挑战，传统机器学习方法无法有效捕捉样本间的依赖关系。
AI.method: ARMA-C3 将样本或图像建模为图节点，利用对比学习和图割正则化（graph-cut regularization），在非监督与半监督设定下学习结构上有意义且具有判别性的节点表示，从而捕获样本间关系。
AI.result: 在 ADNI、NIFD 以及 BreastMNIST、PneumoniaMNIST、肝脏超声数据集共五个数据集上的二分类实验中，ARMA-C3 在多种评估设定下，尤其在标注受限和严重类别不平衡时，表现优于经典聚类方法、最先进机器学习模型及现有图深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: ARMA-C3 展示了鲁棒的表示学习能力与跨模态泛化能力，表明基于图结构的关系建模能够有效提升生物医学影像中少样本与不平衡分类任务的性能。

title: StreamChar: Long-Horizon Streaming Character Audio-Video Generation with Decoupled Orchestration
summary: Real-time streaming joint audio-video generation for character animation requires a generator to speak the requested transcript, maintain visual identity across chunks, and run within a strict playback budget. These requirements are difficult to satisfy simultaneously: chunk-wise autoregressive generation can accumulate transcript-audio misalignment and visual drift, while the few-step distillation needed for low latency often degrades spatial diversity and temporal quality. We present StreamChar, a streaming framework that separates long-horizon orchestration from short-window audio-video denoising. An LLM-based orchestrator uses the transcript and historical context to produce frame-aligned audio conditions, and a joint audio-video DiT performs local bidirectional denoising with reference and motion-frame conditioning. For efficient deployment, we use a two-stage distillation pipeline that first compresses the sampler and then fine-tunes the student under online chunk rollouts. A progress-aware pointer aligns partial transcripts with generated audio during rollout training, and a sink-chunk memory provides a persistent visual anchor for reducing long-horizon drift. Experiments on short-clip and long-horizon protocols show that StreamChar runs in real time on a single H100 GPU and provides a favorable system-level trade-off among transcript fidelity, audio-visual synchronization, visual quality, and streaming stability compared with recent joint and audio-driven baselines.

AI.tldr: StreamChar提出了一种流式框架，将长程编排与短窗口音视频去噪分离，结合LLM编排器与联合音视频DiT，通过两阶段蒸馏和进度感知指针实现高保真、低延迟的实时流式角色动画生成。
AI.motivation: 实时流式联合音视频生成面临三重矛盾：逐块自回归生成会导致转录-音频对齐累积误差和视觉漂移，而为降低延迟所需的少步蒸馏又往往损害空间多样性和时间质量，现有方法难以同时满足转录保真度、视觉一致性、音画同步和流式稳定性。
AI.method: StreamChar采用双模块架构：基于LLM的编排器利用转录和历史上下文生成帧对齐的音频条件，联合音视频DiT通过参考帧和运动帧条件进行局部双向去噪。部署方面采用两阶段蒸馏流水线，先压缩采样器再在线块展开下精调学生模型；引入进度感知指针对齐部分转录与生成音频，并使用汇块内存提供持久视觉锚点以减少长程漂移。
AI.result: 在短片段和长程协议上的实验表明，StreamChar在单个H100 GPU上实现实时运行，在转录保真度、音视频同步、视觉质量和流式稳定性方面相比近期联合生成和音频驱动基线取得了更好的系统级权衡。
AI.conclusion: StreamChar通过编排-去噪分离架构和针对性优化（两阶段蒸馏、进度感知指针、汇块内存）有效解决了流式音视频生成中的对齐漂移和视觉退化问题，为实时角色动画提供了一套可行的系统级解决方案。

title: DRM: Diffusion-based Reward Model With Step-wise Guidance
summary: Current mainstream methods of aligning diffusion models with human preferences typically employ VLM-based reward models. However, these reward models, pre-trained for semantic alignment, struggle to capture the essential perceptual qualities-such as aesthetics, composition, and visual harmony. In this work, we argue that a model capable of high-fidelity generation must possess a profound understanding of these visual attributes. Based on this insight, we introduce the Diffusion-based Reward Model (DRM), a novel paradigm that use the pre-trained diffusion model as a powerful evaluative backbone. A key advantage of the DRM is its unique ability to assess not only the final image but also the noisy intermediate latents at any stage of the generative process. We leverage this step-wise evaluative capacity in two ways. First, we propose Step-wise GRPO, a reinforcement learning algorithm that provides dense, per-step rewards to resolve the imprecise credit assignment problem in GRPO algorithm, leading to more stable and effective alignment. Second, we introduce Step-wise Sampling, a novel inference strategy that employs the DRM as a dynamic guide to evaluate multiple generation paths at each step, steering the process towards higher-quality outcomes. Extensive experiments confirm that our approach significantly enhances the final quality of generated images. Code: https://github.com/jjaxonx/DRM.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于扩散模型的奖励模型（DRM），借助预训练扩散模型对视觉属性的深刻理解，通过步进式GRPO强化学习算法和步进式采样推理策略，显著提升扩散模型生成图像的感知质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于VLM的奖励模型在扩散模型对齐中因专注于语义对齐而难以捕捉美学、构图、视觉和谐等核心感知质量，亟需一种能深刻理解这些视觉属性的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出DRM，将预训练扩散模型作为评估骨干；在此基础上提出步进式GRPO算法，利用DRM对生成过程中任意噪声中间潜变量的逐步骤评估能力，为每步提供密集奖励以解决GRPO中信用分配不精确的问题；同时提出步进式采样推理策略，在每个步骤评估多条生成路径并动态引导生成朝向更高质量结果。
AI.result: 大量实验证明，所提方法在生成图像的最终质量上取得显著提升，具体定量和定性结果均在论文中展示。
AI.conclusion: DRM范式及其配套的步进式GRPO与步进式采样策略有效解决了扩散模型感知质量对齐问题，为扩散模型的训练和推理阶段提供了统一的、基于扩散模型自身的质量评估与优化框架。

title: Towards Open-World Referring Expression Comprehension: A Benchmark with Training-free Multi-task Consistency Checker
summary: Referring expression comprehension (REC) aims to localize a target object within an image based on a given expression. Although recent advances in vision-language models have led to substantial improvements in REC tasks, current REC benchmarks often hold simple scenarios and the assumption that each expression maps to a unique object. These limitations hinder the deployment of REC models in open-world environments. To fill this gap, we introduce OpenRef, a new benchmark for REC in complex visual and linguistic scenarios. OpenRef features three key advancements: 1) Diverse visual scenarios: spanning diverse visual domains, including ground views, drone views, dark scenes and adverse weather conditions; 2) Variable target counts: breaking the single-target limitation with multi-target and none-target samples; 3) Rich vocabulary types: incorporating proper nouns, polysemous words and ordinal terms to fit a wider range of expression needs. Furthermore, as traditional metrics are insufficient for open-world setting, we leverage F1 to measure grounding accuracy and propose N3R (Negative Relative Rejection Reliability) to assess relative rejection reliability against negative expressions. Finally, we introduce Multi-task Consistency Checker (MCC), a training-free but plug-and-play strategy that enhances model performance with one click by enforcing consistency self-verification. Extensive experiments demonstrate that this work significantly advances the performance of existing REC models in complex scenarios, paving the way for open-world REC. Project page: https://zongjianwu.github.io/openref

AI.tldr: OpenRef是一个面向开放世界指代表达理解的新基准，涵盖多样化视觉场景、可变目标数量和丰富词汇类型，并提出N3R指标和MCC策略来提升和评估模型在复杂场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前指代表达理解（REC）基准存在两大局限：场景过于简单（仅涵盖常规视角和光照条件）且假设每个表达唯一对应一个目标，这严重限制了REC模型在开放世界环境中的实际部署能力。
AI.method: OpenRef基准在三个维度上突破传统限制：1）多样视觉场景，包括地面视角、无人机视角、黑暗场景和恶劣天气；2）可变目标数量，引入多目标和无目标样本；3）丰富词汇类型，涵盖专有名词、多义词和序数词。此外，提出N3R（负样本相对拒绝可靠性）指标评估模型对负样本的拒绝能力，并设计MCC（多任务一致性检查器）——一种无需训练、即插即用的策略，通过强制一致性自验证来一键提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在OpenRef基准上的大量实验表明，该工作显著提升了现有REC模型在复杂场景下的性能。F1指标用于衡量定位精度，N3R指标用于评估对负样本的相对拒绝可靠性，证明了现有模型在开放世界场景中的不足以及所提策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: OpenRef填补了开放世界REC基准的空白，MCC作为一种训练无关的增强策略，为现有模型的性能提升提供了即插即用的解决方案，为REC模型在真实开放环境中的部署铺平了道路。

title: Addressing Exacerbated Attention Sink for Source-Free Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) like CLIP have shown impressive generalization capabilities, yet their potential for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning (CDFSL) remains underexplored, where the model needs to transfer source-domain information to target domains with scarce training data. While the attention sink phenomenon has been observed in VLMs for certain tasks, its role in CDFSL scenarios has not been studied. In this paper, we uncover a critical issue overlooked by prior works: standard target-domain few-shot fine-tuning in CDFSL significantly exacerbates the attention sink problem, leading to poor discriminability across classes. To understand this phenomenon, through extensive experiments, we interpret it as the model's shortcut learning for domain adaptation: to overcome the huge domain gap between the source and target domains, the model shows a high tendency to push tokens that are initially closer to target-domain classes (i.e., simple tokens) to be even closer to these classes, exacerbating the attention sink and wasting the capability of learning other discriminative but initially further tokens (i.e., hard tokens). To address this, we propose a novel approach to dynamically re-weight tokens according to their relevance with target-domain classes during the target-domain finetuning, which explicitly suppresses the model's reliance on these simple tokens and enhances the learning of hard tokens, reducing sink tokens and enhancing discriminability. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets validate the rationale of our method, demonstrating new state-of-the-art performance. Our codes are available at https://github.com/shuaiyi308/TIR.

AI.tldr: 本文发现跨域小样本学习（CDFSL）中标准微调会显著加剧注意力沉没问题，导致类别判别性下降，并揭示了该现象是模型为克服域差距而采取的一种捷径学习行为；为此提出基于令牌相关性动态重加权的微调方法，抑制简单令牌的依赖并增强难以区分令牌的学习，在四个基准数据集上取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉-语言模型（如CLIP）在小样本学习中展现出强大的泛化能力，但注意力沉没现象在跨域小样本学习（CDFSL）场景中的作用尚未被研究；本文发现标准的目标域微调会显著加剧注意力沉没问题，导致模型判别性下降，这一关键问题被以往工作所忽视。
AI.method: 本文提出一种基于令牌与目标域类别相关性动态重加权的微调方法，在目标域微调过程中显式抑制模型对简单令牌（初始更接近目标域类别的令牌）的依赖，同时增强对困难令牌（初始距离较远的令牌）的学习，从而减少沉没令牌并提升判别性。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上的大量实验验证了所提方法的合理性，并取得了新的最先进性能，表明该方法有效缓解了注意力沉没问题并提升了跨域小样本学习的判别能力。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了CDFSL中注意力沉没加剧现象的本质是模型为适应域差距而采取的捷径学习行为，并证明了通过动态令牌重加权可有效抑制该问题，为跨域小样本学习提供了新的研究视角和实用方法。

title: Rethinking VLM Representation for VLA Initialization
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models widely adopt pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as policy backbones, yet it remains unclear what kind of pretrained VLM representation is useful as a VLA initialization. In this paper, we study VLA initialization as a controlled representation-design problem along three axes: capability-level embodied VQA supervision, parameter-update strategy, and robot-data pretraining. Our experiments show that the original pretrained VLM representation is a key source of action performance. However, embodied VQA adaptation does not yield uniform gains: its benefit depends on downstream bottlenecks, and gains from different capability domains are not simply additive. For update strategy, LoRA provides a more reliable initialization than Full Finetune, indicating that overly reshaping the pretrained representation can weaken VLA initialization. Robot-data pretraining further improves VLA initialization, with the strongest variant obtained by staged LoRA-based training. Together, these findings suggest that effective VLM-to-VLA adaptation should inject action-relevant embodied and robot-trajectory signals while preserving the pretrained VLM representation that remains useful for action learning.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了VLA初始化中预训练VLM表示的关键作用，发现原始VLM表示是动作性能的主要来源，而LoRA相比全量微调能更可靠地保留该表示；通过分阶段LoRA训练注入具身VQA和机器人轨迹信号可进一步优化初始化效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管VLA模型广泛使用预训练VLM作为策略 backbone，但何种预训练VLM表示对VLA初始化最为有效尚不明确，现有研究缺乏对表示设计空间（包含具身VQA监督、参数更新策略和机器人数据预训练三个维度）的系统性理解。
AI.method: 本文将VLA初始化建模为受控的表示设计问题，沿三个维度进行分析：不同能力层级的具身VQA适应、参数更新策略（LoRA vs. 全量微调）、以及机器人数据预训练；通过对比实验系统评估各因素对动作性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明：（1）原始预训练VLM表示是动作性能的关键来源；（2）具身VQA适应的收益非均匀，取决于下游瓶颈且不同能力域的增益不可简单叠加；（3）LoRA比全量微调提供更可靠的初始化，过度重塑预训练表示会削弱VLA初始化；（4）机器人数据预训练进一步提升初始化效果，最优方案为基于LoRA的分阶段训练。
AI.conclusion: 有效的VLM到VLA适配应在注入动作相关的具身和机器人轨迹信号的同时，保留对动作学习仍然有用的预训练VLM表示；分阶段LoRA训练是实现这一平衡的有效策略。

title: An Analysis Focused on Womens Safety: Can VAD Models Be Enhanced by a Multi-modal Dataset?
summary: Women's safety and security are paramount for a modern society. Crimes against women occur in daylight as well as in low-light conditions. Often, such events are captured through real-world surveillance cameras that operate at lower resolutions. Despite substantial progress in CV-related research, video anomaly detection (VAD) focused on women's safety has not yet been adequately addressed. Existing video anomaly datasets contain well-lit, high-resolution, close-shot videos, and fail to represent women-centric anomalies such as chain snatching, stalking, inappropriate touch, and other subtle forms of crime against women. To address these problems, we propose the ExtrAnom dataset, a new multi-modal benchmark containing 1001 videos with textual descriptions, 500 normal and 501 anomalous, classified into 5 different types of women-centric crimes. The dataset comprises low-light (8%), low-resolution videos (13%), long-shot (15%), along with daylight (64%) anomalous videos. And it covers anomalous events like stalking (3.9%), chain snatching (17.6%), kidnapping (7.3%), assassinations (2.3%), harassment (18.9%), and normal (50%). Each video is supplemented with 4 textual annotations, including one human-generated and three LLM-generated descriptions, enabling cross-modal and VLM-based validations. The aim of creating a women-centric dataset is to accurately detect the women-centric anomaly patterns, which are possible to observe visually. The dataset supplements the VLMs to accurately generate video-level descriptions. ExtrAnom has been benchmarked against popular unimodal and multi-modal VAD datasets (e.g., XD-Violence, UCF-Crime, and UCA) and SOTA methods. Experiments reveal that the existing datasets are insufficient to train models for detecting women-centric anomalies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ExtrAnom数据集，一个面向女性安全的多模态视频异常检测基准，包含1001个带文本标注的视频，覆盖5类女性特定犯罪场景，实验表明现有数据集和SOTA方法在此任务上表现不足。
AI.motivation: 现有视频异常检测数据集主要关注高分辨率、良好光照、近景的通用异常视频，缺乏专门针对女性安全场景的数据，无法覆盖如链抢、跟踪、不当触摸等细微且针对性强的女性特定犯罪类型，导致相关检测模型训练不足。
AI.method: 构建ExtrAnom多模态基准数据集，包含1001个视频（500正常、501异常）及对应文本描述，覆盖跟踪、链抢、绑架、暗杀、骚扰5类女性犯罪，包含低光（8%）、低分辨率（13%）、长镜头（15%）等多样场景；每个视频提供1条人工和3条LLM生成的文本注释，支持跨模态和视觉语言模型验证，并在多个SOTA方法上进行基准测试。
AI.result: ExtrAnom数据集在XD-Violence、UCF-Crime、UCA等流行单模态和多模态VAD数据集上进行了基准测试，实验结果表明现有数据集训练的模型无法有效检测女性特定异常。
AI.conclusion: 现有视频异常检测数据集在女性安全场景上存在严重不足，ExtrAnom数据集填补了这一空白，其多模态标注和多样化的真实场景设计能够更准确地表征女性特定异常模式，为相关领域研究提供了重要基准。

title: [CLS] is Not Enough: Multi-Label Recognition via Patch-Level Inference and Adaptive Aggregation
summary: Vision-Language Models such as CLIP exhibit strong zero-shot recognition capability by aligning images with textual concepts, yet they often underperform on multi-label recognition where multiple objects co-exist. A key bottleneck is that the [CLS] token, as a single global visual representation, is insufficient to faithfully encode diverse targets with varying scales, contexts, and co-occurrence patterns. To address this limitation, we present a new multi-label image recognition framework, termed PIAA, which formulates prediction as Patch-level Inference followed by Adaptive Aggregation. Specifically, we first enhance patch-wise predictions from two complementary perspectives: (i) mitigating semantic entanglement in the visual encoder to obtain more discriminative patch representations, and (ii) learning an unsupervised visual classifier to narrow the vision-language modality gap. We then introduce an adaptive aggregation module that consolidates patch-level scores into the final multi-label prediction. Notably, the entire pipeline is fully training-free, requiring no gradient updates or parameter fine-tuning. Experiments show that our method achieves strong improvements with minimal extra computation, exceeding a 6% mAP gain on the challenging NUS-WIDE benchmark over representative baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/akang-wang/PIAA.

AI.tldr: PIAA是一种无需训练的视觉语言模型多标签识别框架，通过补丁级推理与自适应聚合，在NUS-WIDE基准上相比代表性基线实现超过6% mAP的提升。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型（如CLIP）在零样本识别中表现优异，但在多标签图像识别任务中性能不佳，根本原因是单一的[CLS]全局视觉表征难以忠实编码具有不同尺度、上下文和共现模式的多个目标。
AI.method: PIAA框架将多标签预测分解为补丁级推理与自适应聚合两个阶段：一方面从两个互补视角增强逐补丁预测——缓解视觉编码器中的语义纠缠以获得更具判别性的补丁表征，以及学习无监督视觉分类器以缩小视觉语言模态差距；另一方面引入自适应聚合模块将补丁级分数整合为最终的多标签预测，整个流程无需梯度更新或参数微调。
AI.result: 在NUS-WIDE基准上，PIAA相比代表性基线实现了超过6% mAP的提升，且仅需极少的额外计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 通过补丁级推理与自适应聚合，PIAA在完全无需训练的条件下显著提升了视觉语言模型的多标签识别能力，为训练高效的多标签识别提供了一种轻量级且有效的范式。

title: SAM3-Assisted Training of Lightweight YOLO Models for Precision Pig Farming
comment: Accepted for publication at the IEEE Sensors Applications Symposium (SAS 2026)
summary: Deep learning-based object detection has revolutionized Precision Livestock Farming (PLF), yet a critical barrier remains: high-performance Foundation Models (such as SAM 3) are too computationally intensive for edge deployment, while lightweight models (like YOLO) require prohibitive manual annotation efforts. This work proposes a fully automated knowledge distillation pipeline that leverages the Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM 3) to generate zero-shot pseudo-labels for training efficient YOLOv8 detectors. By treating SAM 3 as an offline auto-annotator, we eliminate the manual labeling bottleneck, producing models capable of real-time inference on resource-constrained hardware. We systematically evaluate this approach on the PigLife dataset, comparing SAM 3-supervised models against human-annotated baselines. Results demonstrate that a SAM 3-trained YOLOv8m achieves a mean Average Precision (mAP) of 79.4% without human intervention, while reducing inference latency by approximately 200$\times$ compared to the teacher model. Furthermore, stratified analysis reveals that in low-occlusion scenarios, the automated pipeline achieves detection rates comparable to human benchmarks ($AP_{50} > 99\%$). These findings indicate that foundation models can serve as effective, zero-annotation-cost supervisors, enabling scalable edge computing solutions for smart agriculture.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全自动知识蒸馏框架，利用SAM 3作为零样本标注器生成伪标签来训练YOLOv8检测器，无需人工标注即可在边缘设备上实现实时目标检测，在PigLife数据集上达到79.4%的mAP，推理速度相较教师模型提升约200倍。
AI.motivation: 高精度基础模型（如SAM 3）计算开销过大，无法部署于边缘设备；而轻量级模型（如YOLO）虽推理高效，但严重依赖昂贵且耗时的人工标注。这一矛盾阻碍了深度学习目标检测在精准畜牧业中的规模化应用。
AI.method: 提出完全自动化的知识蒸馏流水线：将SAM 3作为离线自动标注器（auto-annotator），以零样本方式生成伪标签，用于训练轻量级YOLOv8检测器。该框架无需任何人工标注干预，直接利用教师模型（SAM 3）的预测结果监督学生模型（YOLOv8）的训练。
AI.result: 在PigLife数据集上，由SAM 3训练的YOLOv8m达到79.4%的mAP（无人工标注）；推理延迟相比教师模型降低约200倍。在低遮挡场景下，自动流水线的检测率与人工标注基准相当（AP50 > 99%）。
AI.conclusion: 基础模型可作为有效的零标注成本监督信号，替代人工标注，从而为智能农业等场景提供可扩展的边缘计算解决方案。该方法在低遮挡条件下表现尤为突出，展示了知识蒸馏在资源受限设备上部署高精度检测器的潜力。

title: DyCoRM: Dynamic Criterion-Aware Reward Modeling for Text-to-Image Generation
summary: With the continued advancement of text-to-image (T2I) generation, producing high-quality images is becoming increasingly attainable; consequently, user demands are shifting toward images that better satisfy their specific requirements. As reward models play an increasingly important role in assessing whether generated images align with user preference, this trend introduces an important challenge for reward modeling: rather than relying solely on static and general evaluation dimensions, reward models should account for the task-relevant and fine-grained criteria through which users assess whether generated images meet their specific requirements. To address this challenge, we propose DyCoRM, a dynamic, criterion-aware reward model that grounds task-relevant criteria and performs criterion-aware preference comparison. To support this setting, we construct DyCoDataset-20K, which provides dynamic criteria together with criterion-level annotations, and further derive DyCoBench-1K, a benchmark for systematically evaluating reward models under dynamic criteria. We further introduce DyCoPick, which applies criterion-aware reward modeling to selecting T2I images. Our contributions establish the first reward modeling framework for dynamic and fine-grained evaluation and practical application in T2I generation.

AI.tldr: DyCoRM 提出了一种动态、面向准则的奖励模型框架，通过构建 DyCoDataset-20K 数据集和 DyCoBench-1K 基准，实现基于任务相关细粒度准则的文本到图像生成评估与图像选择，弥补了现有奖励模型仅依赖静态通用维度的不足。
AI.motivation: 随着文本到图像生成质量的提升，用户需求转向更精细化的图像生成要求，而现有奖励模型仅依赖静态和通用的评价维度，无法捕捉用户用于评估图像是否符合特定需求的任务相关细粒度准则。因此，亟需一种能够动态感知并基于细粒度准则进行偏好比较的奖励模型。
AI.method: DyCoRM 是一种动态、面向准则的奖励模型，其核心在于将任务相关准则进行 grounding，并基于准则进行偏好比较。该工作构建了 DyCoDataset-20K 数据集，提供动态准则及准则级别的标注，并从中衍生出 DyCoBench-1K 基准用于系统评估。此外，提出了 DyCoPick 方法，将准则感知的奖励建模应用于文本到图像生成的图像选择任务中。
AI.result: 该工作建立了首个面向动态细粒度评估的奖励建模框架，并构建了相应的数据集 DyCoDataset-20K 和基准 DyCoBench-1K，通过 DyCoPick 展示了准则感知奖励建模在文本到图像生成图像选择中的实际应用效果。
AI.conclusion: DyCoRM 为文本到图像生成中的奖励建模提供了首个动态、细粒度的评估框架，表明将任务相关动态准则纳入奖励模型能够更准确地捕捉用户偏好，为未来在细粒度生成评估与对齐任务中应用准则感知奖励模型奠定了基础。

title: AgentGrounder: Zero-Shot 3D Visual Pointcloud Grounding using Multimodal Language Models
summary: 3D Visual Grounding (3DVG) is an essential capability for embodied AI, requiring agents to localize objects in 3D scenes based on natural language descriptions. Recent zero-shot methods leverage 2D vision-language models (LVLMs). However, they often rely on existing sets of multi-view images and struggle with the limited semantic and spatial details provided by standard 3D segmentation tools. We present $\textbf{AgentGrounder}$, a zero-shot 3D visual grounding framework that operates directly on colored point clouds without task-specific 3D training. Our approach follows a two-stage design: (1) an offline stage that applies 3D model to build an Object Lookup Table (OLT) with instance IDs, semantic labels, 3D bounding boxes; and (2) an online tool-driven agent that decomposes each query, retrieves only relevant candidates from the OLT, performs geometric scoring, and triggers image rendering on demand when additional visual evidence (e.g., color, material, or viewpoint-sensitive cues) is required. Compared with fixed anchor-target matching pipelines, this design reduces cascading matching errors and improves context-window efficiency by avoiding prompts overloaded with irrelevant objects. We evaluate on ScanRefer and Nr3D under a zero-shot setting and observe consistent improvements over SeeGround in our setup, including +2.5% Acc@0.5 on ScanRefer and +6.3% on Nr3D, with a notable +6.3% gain on Nr3D view-independent queries. These results show that combining selective retrieval, geometric reasoning, and adaptive visual inspection yields a practical and robust foundation for open-vocabulary 3D grounding. Our code is available at https://github.com/be2rlab/AgentGrounder.

AI.tldr: AgentGrounder 是一种零样本 3D 视觉定位框架，通过离线构建对象查找表与在线工具驱动智能体相结合，利用选择性检索、几何评分和按需图像渲染，在无需任务特定 3D 训练的情况下，在 ScanRefer 和 Nr3D 基准上取得了优于 SeeGround 的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本 3D 视觉定位方法依赖 2D 视觉语言模型，但受限于固定的多视图图像集合以及标准 3D 分割工具提供的语义和空间细节不足，且基于固定锚点-目标匹配的流程容易产生级联匹配错误并导致上下文窗口效率低下。
AI.method: AgentGrounder 采用两阶段设计：离线阶段利用 3D 模型构建包含实例 ID、语义标签和 3D 边界框的对象查找表；在线阶段通过工具驱动智能体分解查询、从对象查找表中检索相关候选、进行几何评分，并在需要额外视觉证据（如颜色、材质或视角敏感线索）时按需触发图像渲染。
AI.result: 在 ScanRefer 和 Nr3D 的零样本设置下，AgentGrounder 相比 SeeGround 在 ScanRefer 上 Acc@0.5 提升 2.5%，在 Nr3D 上提升 6.3%，其中在 Nr3D 视角无关查询上增益达 6.3%。
AI.conclusion: 选择性检索、几何推理与自适应视觉检测相结合能够为零样本开放词汇 3D 视觉定位提供实用且稳健的基础，有效减少了级联错误并提升了上下文窗口效率。

title: R5DGS: Semantic-Aware 4D Gaussian Splatting with Rigid Body Constraints for Efficient Dynamic Scene Reconstruction
summary: Reconstructing and predicting dynamic 3D scenes from multi-view videos is a foundational task for robotics, AR/VR, and digital twins. Recent physics-informed Gaussian Splatting methods achieve impressive future frame extrapolation but lack semantic awareness and suffer from large computational overhead. We introduce $\textbf{R5DGS}$, a framework that augments a physics-driven 4D Gaussian representation with compact Identity Encoding vectors, enabling precise Gaussian-to-object association. By constructing an offline CLIP-based object lookup table, we support open-vocabulary text prompting to retrieve and render object-specific Gaussians across arbitrary timestamps and viewpoints. Furthermore, we propose a rigid-body inference constraint that predicts and integrates physical dynamics exclusively for object centroids, propagating motion to associated Gaussians via relative transformations. This optimization yields a 11 FPS speedup during extrapolation without compromising trajectories plausibility.

AI.tldr: R5DGS通过将紧凑的Identity Encoding向量与CLIP驱动的开放词汇查询相结合，增强了基于物理信息的4D高斯表征，实现了高效、语义感知的动态3D场景重建与预测，并在外推阶段获得了11 FPS的加速。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于物理信息的高斯溅射方法虽然能够实现令人印象深刻的未来帧外推，但缺乏语义感知能力，且计算开销巨大，难以满足机器人、AR/VR和数字孪生等应用对高效、可交互动态场景建模的需求。
AI.method: R5DGS在物理驱动的4D高斯表示中引入紧凑的Identity Encoding向量，实现精确的高斯-对象关联；构建离线CLIP对象查找表，支持开放词汇文本提示以检索和渲染特定对象的高斯；提出刚体推理约束，仅预测和积分对象质心的物理动力学，通过相对变换将运动传播到关联高斯，从而提升外推效率。
AI.result: 该方法在外推阶段实现了11 FPS的推理速度提升，同时保持了轨迹的物理合理性和预测质量，验证了通过质心级物理推理与高斯级运动传播相结合能够显著降低计算开销而不损失性能。
AI.conclusion: R5DGS表明，将语义感知的身份编码与高效刚体物理约束引入4D高斯表示，能够在保持动态场景外推质量的同时大幅提升计算效率，为开放词汇、交互式动态场景理解与预测提供了可行的技术路径。

title: LRDDv3: High-Resolution Long-Range Drone Detection Dataset with Range Information and Thermal Data
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Accepted to the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
summary: Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) have quickly become common in various airspaces, representing a wide range of applications from recreation flying to commercial photography and package delivery. With the increasing prevalence of UAVs, it becomes critical that both manned and unmanned aircraft can detect UAVs and other flying objects from long range to effectively track movement and ensure safe operation in shared spaces. While several datasets have been introduced for drone detection, the need for expanded high-quality data persists, especially in the area of high-resolution long-range drone data. To address this, we introduce a high-resolution dataset of 102,532 long-range RGB images of drones, sampled at 5 FPS from 128 distinct video clips taken mid flight during 17 different data collection days spread over 8 months to ensure a wide variety of lighting scenarios, flight locations, and background elements. The dataset boasts comprehensive drone range information across the dataset, as well as 29,630 IR images, all paired with RGB counterparts from the base dataset. As one of the first drone detection datasets to leverage 4K image resolution and paired 640x512 IR images, our work represents a significant advancement to enable the detection of drones at long range. For access to the complete dataset, please visit https://research.coe.drexel.edu/ece/imaple/lrddv3/

AI.tldr: 该研究提出LRDDv3，一个包含102,532张4K分辨率RGB图像和29,630张配对640x512红外图像的高分辨率远程无人机检测数据集，旨在解决现有数据集在远程高分辨率无人机检测方面的数据缺口。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有多个无人机检测数据集，但高质量、高分辨率、远程无人机数据的匮乏仍然是一个突出问题，现有数据难以支持在共享空域中从远距离有效检测和跟踪无人机以确保安全运行的需求。
AI.method: 研究团队构建了一个包含102,532张远程RGB图像的高分辨率数据集，图像以5 FPS从128个不同视频片段中采样，视频采集自17个不同数据采集日（跨越8个月），确保光照、飞行地点和背景元素的多样性；数据集还包含29,630张IR图像，所有红外图像均与基础数据集中的RGB图像成对匹配，采用4K图像分辨率和配对的640x512 IR图像。
AI.result: 数据集包含102,532张远程RGB图像和29,630张配对IR图像，具备覆盖全数据集的详细无人机距离信息，是首批利用4K图像分辨率与配对640x512红外图像的无人机检测数据集之一，显著推进了远程无人机检测能力。
AI.conclusion: 该高分辨率远程无人机检测数据集的提出填补了现有数据集在远程和高分辨率方面的空白，为无人机检测研究提供了更优质的数据基础，有望推动相关领域的安全运行和跟踪技术发展。

title: EchoPilot: Training-Free Ultrasound Video Segmentation via Scale-Space Semantic Prompting and Reliability-Gated Memory
comment: Early accepted to MICCAI 2026. Project page: https://keeplearning-again.github.io/EchoPilot/
summary: Ultrasound video segmentation is clinically valuable yet difficult due to speckle noise, weak boundaries, and rapid anatomical deformation. Recent promptable foundation models enable point-guided segmentation, but their direct deployment in ultrasound remains unreliable: a single point provides insufficient spatial context to resolve scale ambiguity, and greedy memory updates amplify early errors into severe temporal drift. We present EchoPilot, a training-free framework for ultrasound video segmentation under sparse first-frame interaction, requiring only a single point click and an anatomical category name. EchoPilot orchestrates a frozen medical vision-language model (VLM) for semantic localization, a vision foundation model (VFM) for dense geometric feature extraction, and a promptable video segmentor for mask prediction and propagation. To resolve initialization ambiguity, we propose Scale-Space Semantic Prompting, which first selects an optimal contextual view via a parameter-free S.E.E.D. (Semantic Energy-Entropy Density) criterion, and then synthesizes geometrically precise auxiliary point prompts from dense foundation features without additional user interaction. To reduce propagation drift, a Reliability-Gated Memory update is further introduced to selectively freeze the segmentor's memory bank under uncertain predictions, preventing error accumulation. We also contribute the first dynamic fetal placenta ultrasound video segmentation dataset with 671 annotated frames. Across three ultrasound video datasets, EchoPilot achieves state-of-the-art performance under the sparse-interactive setting, consistently outperforming training-free baselines and finetuned specialists.

AI.tldr: EchoPilot 提出了一种无需训练的视频超声分割框架，仅需首帧单点点击和类别名称，通过协同冻结的视觉-语言模型与基础模型、尺度-空间语义提示和可靠性门控记忆更新机制，在稀疏交互设置下实现了超越微调专家的 SOTA 性能。
AI.motivation: 超声视频分割因散斑噪声、弱边界和快速解剖变形而极具挑战；现有可提示基础模型在超声中直接部署不可靠，单点提供空间上下文不足导致尺度歧义，贪婪记忆更新会放大早期误差引发严重时间漂移。
AI.method: EchoPilot 是一个无需训练的多模型协同框架，整合了冻结的医学视觉-语言模型（VLM）用于语义定位、视觉基础模型（VFM）用于密集几何特征提取、以及可提示视频分割器用于掩码预测与传播。为解决初始化歧义，提出尺度-空间语义提示，通过无参数的 S.E.E.D.（语义能量-熵密度）准则选择最优上下文视图，并从密集基础特征中合成几何精确的辅助点提示；为减少传播漂移，引入可靠性门控记忆更新，在预测不确定时选择性冻结分割器的记忆库以防止误差累积。
AI.result: EchoPilot 在三个超声视频数据集上实现了稀疏交互设置下的 SOTA 性能，一致优于无需训练的基线方法和经过微调的专业模型；此外，本文贡献了首个动态胎盘超声视频分割数据集，包含 671 张标注帧。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明通过精心编排多个冻结的通用与医学基础模型并设计轻量级无参数模块（S.E.E.D. 准则与门控记忆更新），可在无需训练的条件下显著提升超声视频分割的鲁棒性，为稀疏交互式医学视频分割提供了高效且可泛化的新范式。

title: RAPTOR+: A Visually Grounded Vision-Language Framework to Improve Clinical Trust and Auditability in Automated Cancer Referral Processing
summary: Urgent suspected colorectal cancer (CRC) referrals create operational bottlenecks because semi-structured clinical documents often require manual review and transcription. The original RAPTOR system used Large Language Models for structured extraction but relied on a separate OCR stage, making it vulnerable to handwriting, layout variation, and loss of visual evidence linkage. We present RAPTOR+, a multimodal extension that uses Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for end-to-end referral understanding. We evaluate fine-tuned VLMs, commercial and open-source zero-shot VLMs, and the original OCR-based pipeline on 223 clinically curated CRC urgent referral forms. We also introduce a grounding-aware evaluation framework that measures both extraction accuracy and evidence localisation. Results show a clear grounding gap in zero-shot models. Gemini 2.5 Flash achieved 92.6% Reading Accuracy but only 1.2% Strict Safety. In contrast, fine-tuned Qwen3-VL-8B achieved 96.1% Reading Accuracy and 60.6% Strict Safety, substantially improving verifiable evidence grounding. These findings show that task-specific fine-tuning is essential for reliable, auditable clinical document understanding. RAPTOR+ enables extracted referral decisions to be linked to visual evidence, supporting safer and more efficient cancer referral triage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAPTOR+，一种基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的多模态扩展系统，用于从半结构化临床文档中端到端提取结直肠癌紧急转诊信息；实验表明，经过微调的Qwen3-VL-8B在提取准确率（96.1%）和可验证证据定位（安全严格度60.6%）上显著优于零样本VLM和传统OCR流水线，证明任务特定微调对于可审计的临床文档理解至关重要。
AI.motivation: 紧急疑似结直肠癌转诊流程中，半结构化临床文档常需人工审核和转录，造成操作瓶颈；原始RAPTOR系统依赖大型语言模型进行结构化提取但需要独立的OCR阶段，对 handwriting、布局变化敏感且丢失了视觉证据的链接，缺乏端到端的视觉-语言理解和可验证的证据定位能力。
AI.method: RAPTOR+采用视觉语言模型（VLM）实现端到端的转诊表单理解，绕开独立的OCR步骤；研究评估了微调VLM、商业和开源零样本VLM以及原始OCR流水线在223份临床整理的CRC紧急转诊表单上的表现，并引入了一种基于接地感知（grounding-aware）的评估框架，同时度量提取准确性和证据定位能力。
AI.result: Gemini 2.5 Flash零样本VLM的阅读准确率为92.6%但安全严格度仅1.2%，存在显著的接地鸿沟；微调后的Qwen3-VL-8B实现了96.1%的阅读准确率和60.6%的安全严格度，在可验证证据定位方面大幅提升，表明零样本模型在临床可审计性上存在严重不足。
AI.conclusion: 任务特定的微调对于实现可靠、可审计的临床文档理解至关重要；RAPTOR+能够将提取的转诊决策与视觉证据相关联，支持更安全、更高效的癌症转诊分诊流程，为临床AI系统的可解释性和可验证性提供了实践路径。

title: PathWISE: Multi-Agent Cancer Pathway Triaging Ontology Learning from Clinical Flowcharts
summary: Clinical pathways are disseminated as visual flowcharts where spatial topology, arrow direction, colour coding, and font weight encode critical triage logic that remains inaccessible to computational systems. We present PathWISE, a five-phase pipeline combining four LLM-based agents with a deterministic depth-first search auditor and a Java compiler critic, transforming these non-computable artefacts into validated, executable HL7 Clinical Quality Language (CQL) libraries deployable as FHIR CDS Hooks services. Purpose-built agents extract flowchart structure into a typed directed graph, perform deterministic path enumeration, conduct a structured semantic audit of every node's computability, generate terminology-constrained CQL definitions verified by the official Java CQL-to-ELM compiler, and produce routing logic covering 100% of enumerated patient journeys. Demonstrated across five UK NHS cancer pathways (colorectal, lung, skin, upper GI, and breast), PathWISE audits up to 183 nodes (182 under the Hybrid configuration), identifies 544 structured governance findings across four issue categories, achieves 100% syntactic compilation success, with UNCOMPUTABLE nodes receiving false placeholders that preserve compilability while surfacing governance gaps for clinical review, and produces zero hallucinated terminology codes for dictionary-covered concepts. Critically, PathWISE confines non-deterministic LLM inference to knowledge extraction while deterministic graph mathematics and a standard compiler underpin every verification step.

AI.tldr: PathWISE是一个五阶段流水线，结合四个LLM智能体与确定性深度优先搜索审计器及Java编译器批评器，将临床路径可视化流程图自动转化为可执行、可部署的HL7 CQL库及FHIR CDS Hooks服务，在五项NHS癌症路径上实现100%编译通过率与零幻觉术语编码。
AI.motivation: 临床路径通常以视觉流程图形式呈现，其空间拓扑、箭头方向、颜色编码和字体粗细编码了关键的分诊逻辑，但这些非计算化的人工制品无法被计算系统直接访问和处理，导致关键的临床决策逻辑在数字化医疗系统中不可用。
AI.method: PathWISE采用五阶段流水线架构：四个基于LLM的智能体分别负责流程图结构提取（构建带类型的有向图）、确定性路径枚举、每个节点的可计算性结构化语义审计、以及生成受术语约束的CQL定义；随后由确定性深度优先搜索审计器验证路径完整性，并由官方Java CQL-to-ELM编译器作为批评器验证语法正确性；整体将非确定性LLM推理严格限制在知识提取阶段，所有验证步骤均由确定性图论数学和标准编译器支撑。
AI.result: 在五项NHS癌症路径（结直肠、肺、皮肤、上消化道和乳腺）上，PathWISE审计多达183个节点（混合配置下为182个），识别出跨四个问题类别的544个结构化治理发现，实现100%语法编译成功；对于不可计算节点使用假占位符以保持可编译性同时暴露治理缺口，且对词典覆盖的概念产生零幻觉术语编码。
AI.conclusion: PathWISE通过将非确定性LLM推理严格限定于知识提取阶段、并由确定性图论和标准编译器支撑所有验证步骤，成功实现了从不可计算的临床流程图到可执行、可部署的CQL库的端到端自动化转换，为临床路径数字化提供了一种可靠且可审计的技术范式。

title: LLaVA-OneVision-2: Towards Next-Generation Perceptual Intelligence
summary: We introduce LLaVA-OneVision-2 (LLaVA-OV-2), the most capable vision-language model in the LLaVA-OneVision series to date, achieving superior performance across a broad range of multimodal benchmarks. The model builds on a native OneVision-Encoder and incorporates Windowed Attention for efficient local computation while maintaining native resolution. Its key advance is codec-stream tokenization: it treats compressed video as a continuous bit-cost stream, where bit-cost dynamics determine adaptive temporal groups, and motion-residual cues select salient spatial evidence into compact visual canvases. This allocation concentrates a limited token budget on event-bearing content, enabling more stable long-video token compression than fixed groups of pictures. A shared 3D RoPE further places codec canvases, sampled frames, and images in a unified spatiotemporal coordinate system. Furthermore, we build the LLaVA-OV-2 data and training stack around large-scale open supervision: approximately 8M re-captioned video samples for pretraining, a 4M-sample spatial corpus for fine-tuning. We also introduce JumpScore, a temporal-localization benchmark targeting fine-grained grounding in high-frequency, densely repeated motion, a regime underrepresented by existing video evaluations. A standout capability of LLaVA-OV-2 is its unified perception across video understanding, temporal grounding, spatial grounding, and manipulation-trace reasoning. On JumpScore, LLaVA-OneVision-2-8B reaches 74.9 JumpScore mAP, surpassing Qwen3-VL-8B (30.1) by +44.8 points; under matched visual-token budgets on the same benchmark, codec-stream inputs improve temporal grounding over frame sampling by +9.7 points. Across standard benchmarks, LLaVA-OneVision-2-8B further outperforms Qwen3-VL-8B by +4.3 average points on video tasks, +5.3 on spatial tasks, and +15.6 average J&F on tracking tasks.

AI.tldr: LLaVA-OneVision-2 (LLaVA-OV-2) 提出了码流分词化（codec-stream tokenization）方法，将压缩视频视为连续比特成本流，通过比特成本动态和运动残差线索实现自适应时域分组与空间证据选择，在统一的时空坐标系下完成高效长视频令牌压缩，在视频理解、时空定位和追踪等任务上显著超越 Qwen3-VL-8B 等模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型在处理长视频时面临令牌预算有限与视频内容冗余之间的矛盾，固定分组（fixed groups of pictures）的压缩策略无法自适应地聚焦于事件承载内容，且在时域定位方面缺乏针对高频率、密集重复运动场景的细粒度评估基准。
AI.method: LLaVA-OV-2 基于原生 OneVision-Encoder 架构，引入 Windowed Attention 实现高效局部计算并保持原生分辨率；核心创新为码流分词化（codec-stream tokenization），将压缩视频视为连续比特成本流，利用比特成本动态定义自适应时域分组，并依据运动残差线索选择显著空间证据构成紧凑视觉画布（visual canvases），通过共享 3D RoPE 将码流画布、采样帧和图像置于统一的时空坐标系中；训练采用约 8M 重新字幕视频样本预训练和 4M 空间语料微调的大规模开放监督流程。
AI.result: LLaVA-OneVision-2-8B 在 JumpScore 基准上达到 74.9 mAP，超越 Qwen3-VL-8B（30.1）44.8 分；在相同视觉令牌预算下，码流分词输入相比帧采样在时域定位上提升 9.7 分；在标准基准上，视频任务平均超越 Qwen3-VL-8B 4.3 分，空间任务 5.3 分，追踪任务 J&F 平均提升 15.6 分。
AI.conclusion: LLaVA-OV-2 验证了码流分词化在长视频令牌压缩中的有效性，实现了统一的跨模态感知能力（视频理解、时域定位、空间定位和操作轨迹推理），并引入 JumpScore 基准填补了高频率密集运动场景细粒度时域定位评估的空白，为视觉-语言模型在高效视频理解与定位任务上的进一步发展提供了新的技术路线。

title: DRScaffold: Boosting Dense-Scene Reasoning in Lightweight Vision Language Models
summary: Lightweight vision-language models perform competitively on standard benchmarks yet fail systematically in dense-scene reasoning, where multiple objects, attributes, and relations must be jointly grounded and resolved through multi-step inference. Such capability is critical for real-world applications where models must reliably interpret cluttered environments. Yet existing training signals provide no explicit grounding between reasoning steps and the underlying visual entities and relations, leaving lightweight models free to generate fluent but visually unanchored reasoning chains. To address this gap, we first introduce DRBench, a benchmark of 14,573 questions across 2,943 images, organized into five task categories spanning three progressive reasoning layers. Building on DRBench, we propose DRScaffold, a supervised fine-tuning framework that decomposes the supervision target into four causally ordered stages, enforcing grounded reasoning without architectural modification. Experiments on three lightweight VLMs demonstrate substantial gains on DRBench while preserving or improving performance on general-purpose benchmarks. Notably, Qwen2.5-VL-3B trained with DRScaffold surpasses the frozen Qwen2.5-VL-32B on DRBench, demonstrating that structured supervision can substitute for a significant portion of model scale in dense-scene reasoning. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/irene-shi/DRScaffold .

AI.tldr: 本文提出DRBench基准和DRScaffold训练框架，通过将监督目标分解为四个因果阶段来实现轻量级视觉语言模型在密集场景推理中的接地推理，使3B参数的Qwen2.5-VL模型在密集场景推理中超越冻结的32B模型。
AI.motivation: 轻量级视觉语言模型在标准基准上表现良好，但在需要多步推理以联合定位多个物体、属性和关系的密集场景推理中系统性失败。现有训练信号缺乏推理步骤与视觉实体之间的显式接地，导致模型生成流畅但缺乏视觉锚定的推理链条，这一问题严重限制了模型在真实杂乱环境中的应用。
AI.method: 本文首先构建DRBench基准，包含14,573个问题、2,943张图像，覆盖五个任务类别和三个渐进推理层级。在此基础上提出DRScaffold，一种监督微调框架，将监督目标分解为四个因果有序的阶段，在不修改模型架构的前提下强制实现接地推理。
AI.result: 在三个轻量级VLM上的实验表明，DRScaffold在DRBench上取得显著提升，同时保持或改善通用基准性能。尤其值得注意的是，使用DRScaffold训练的Qwen2.5-VL-3B在DRBench上超越冻结的Qwen2.5-VL-32B，表明结构化监督可以在密集场景推理中替代相当一部分模型规模带来的收益。
AI.conclusion: 结构化监督能够显著替代模型规模在密集场景推理中的作用，为轻量级模型在复杂视觉推理任务中的应用提供了可行路径。该研究揭示了推理过程显式接地对于视觉语言模型在密集场景中可靠性的关键重要性，并为未来工作提供了基准和训练框架。

title: Paris 2.0: A Decentralized Diffusion Model for Video Generation
summary:
We present Paris 2.0, the first video generation model pre-trained through decentralized computation. Its training recipe builds upon Paris 1.0 (arXiv:2510.03434), the first ever open-weight Decentralized Diffusion Model (DDM), which showed that image generation can be trained without a monolithic GPU cluster. However, temporally coherent video generation had remained an open problem under decentralized training, and Paris 2.0 closes it.
  In low-resolution text-to-video training, against a monolithic model trained on the same data under a matched total compute budget, Paris 2.0 cuts Frechet Video Distance (FVD) from 561.04 to 279.01, a ~2.0x improvement, and lifts CLIP text-video similarity and aesthetic score.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Paris 2.0，首个通过去中心化计算训练的視頻生成模型，在无需单体GPU集群的条件下，将FVD从561.04降至279.01，提升约2.0倍。
AI.motivation: Paris 1.0已证明图像生成可通过去中心化训练实现，但时间上连贯的視頻生成在去中心化训练框架下仍是一个未解决的开放问题，Paris 2.0旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: Paris 2.0建立在Paris 1.0（首个开源权重的去中心化扩散模型DDM）的训练方案之上，通过去中心化计算对低分辨率文本到视频任务进行训练，无需依赖单体GPU集群。
AI.result: 在与使用相同数据和匹配总计算预算训练的单体模型的对比中，Paris 2.0将Frechet Video Distance（FVD）从561.04降低至279.01，提升约2.0倍，同时提高了CLIP文本-视频相似度分数和美学评分。
AI.conclusion: Paris 2.0表明去中心化训练范式可成功扩展至视频生成任务，在显著超越同等计算预算下单体模型性能的同时，降低了对大规模硬件集群的依赖，为分布式模型训练提供了新的可行性。

title: Channel-wise Vector Quantization
summary: We present Channel-wise Vector Quantization (CVQ), a novel image tokenization paradigm that replaces patch-wise tokens with channel-wise tokens. Unlike conventional vector quantization, which assigns a discrete token to each patch feature vector, CVQ quantizes each channel of the feature map. This formulation represents an image as discrete levels of visual details, rather than as a grid of spatial patches. Based on CVQ, we introduce a new visual autoregressive framework with "next-channel prediction". Instead of rendering images patch by patch in raster order, our Channel-wise Autoregressive (CAR) model predicts image channels sequentially, producing progressively enriched visual details. Specifically, it first sketches global structure and then refines fine-grained attributes, akin to a human artist's workflow. Empirically, we show that: (1) CVQ achieves 100% codebook utilization with a 16K+ codebook size without any bells and whistles, and substantially improves reconstruction quality over conventional VQ; and (2) CAR attains a DPG score of 86.7 and a GenEval score of 0.79, demonstrating strong effectiveness for text-to-image generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通道级向量量化（CVQ）范式，将图像表征为离散的视觉细节层级而非空间网格，并基于此构建通道级自回归（CAR）模型，通过“下一通道预测”实现从全局结构到细粒度属性的渐进式图像生成，在重构质量和文本到图像生成任务上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 传统向量量化将特征图的每个patch特征向量映射为离散token，以空间网格形式表示图像，存在码本利用率低、难以捕捉全局结构等问题；本文旨在探索一种替代性的图像分词范式，以更符合人类艺术家创作流程的方式（先勾勒全局结构再细化细节）进行图像生成。
AI.method: 提出通道级向量量化（CVQ），对特征图的每个通道而非每个patch进行量化，将图像表示为离散的视觉细节层级；基于CVQ构建通道级自回归（CAR）模型，采用“下一通道预测”策略，按通道顺序自回归地预测图像，首先生成全局结构再逐步细化细节属性。
AI.result: CVQ在无需任何额外技巧的条件下实现了16000+码本大小的100%码本利用率，且重构质量显著优于传统VQ；CAR模型在文本到图像生成任务中取得DPG分数86.7和GenEval分数0.79，展示了强大的生成效果。
AI.conclusion: 通道级分词范式有效克服了传统patch级VQ的码本利用瓶颈，且“下一通道预测”的自回归策略天然契合从粗到细的图像生成逻辑，为视觉自回归建模提供了新的方向。

title: InstructSAM: Segment Any Instance with Any Instructions
summary: In this paper, we introduce InstructSAM, a unified and streamlined framework designed for multi-instance segmentation under arbitrary instructions. We formulates instruction-driven instance segmentation as a set-structured query prediction problem and propose an explicit reasoning-to-instance query interface that elegantly bridges a vision-language model (VLM) and SAM3. Specifically, a bank of learnable instance queries is injected into the VLM and contextualized with instruction and visual information, enabling each query to serve as an instance-aware slot. A hybrid-attention mechanism further promotes interaction among these queries, visual tokens, and instruction tokens, improving instance enumeration and reducing duplicate predictions. The resulting LLM-conditioned queries are projected into SAM3's detector query space to drive accurate multi-instance segmentation in a single forward pass. This design equips SAM3 with high-level instruction understanding, compositional reasoning, and instance-level set prediction without modifying its core architecture. To support training and evaluation, we further construct Inst2Seg, a high-quality and large-scale instruction-based instance segmentation dataset and benchmark that couples free-form instructions with instance-level masks. Extensive experiments show that only 2B-scale InstructSAM achieves strong results across complex instruction-driven and phrase-level referring segmentation benchmarks, outperforming prior end-to-end methods and SAM3's agentic pipeline while enabling efficient single-pass multi-instance prediction.

AI.tldr: InstructSAM 提出一个统一的框架，将 SAM 与视觉语言模型通过可学习的实例查询接口桥接，支持任意指令驱动的多实例分割，仅用 2B 参数即在多个基准上超越以往端到端方法和 SAM 的 agentic 流水线。
AI.motivation: 现有的多实例分割方法难以同时理解任意自由形式的语言指令并在指令驱动下进行准确的实例级集预测，而基于 SAM 的 agentic 流水线（如将 VLM 与 SAM 串联）效率低且无法在单次前向传播中完成多实例推理与分割。
AI.method: InstructSAM 将指令驱动的实例分割形式化为集合结构的查询预测问题，通过在 VLM 中注入可学习的实例查询，并设计混合注意力机制促进查询、视觉 token 和指令 token 之间的交互，最终将 VLM 条件化的查询投影到 SAM3 的检测器查询空间，在单次前向传播中驱动多实例分割。同时构建了 Inst2Seg 大型高质量指令驱动实例分割数据集。
AI.result: 仅 2B 参数量的 InstructSAM 在复杂指令驱动和短语级指代分割基准上均取得强劲结果，超越以往的端到端方法和 SAM 的 agentic 流水线，同时在单次前向传播中即可实现高效的多实例预测。
AI.conclusion: 该工作表明，通过设计显式的推理到实例查询接口，可以在不修改 SAM 核心架构的前提下赋予其高层指令理解、组合推理和实例级集预测能力，为统一视觉语言推理与实例分割提供了高效且可扩展的新范式。

title: EVIDENT: Routing MLLM Adaptation through Entity-Grounded Visual Evidence for Cross-Domain Video Temporal Grounding
summary: Fine-tuning MLLMs for Video Temporal Grounding (VTG) often improves in-domain performance but degrades sharply under domain shift. In this work, we find that this failure is primarily driven not just by unseen query concepts, but by visual domain shift, which prevents the model from coupling its learned temporal localization knowledge with its inherent entity-attention capability. To address this, we introduce EVIDENT, a parameter-efficient adaptation framework that anchors temporal grounding in the inherent entity-attention of pre-trained MLLMs by routing VTG adaptation through explicit visual entity evidence. EVIDENT consists of three components: (i) an Entity Bottleneck Adapter that transforms dense visual tokens into compact entity-level slots, (ii) an Entity-Binding Distillation loss that instills objectness priors into the semantically unstructured MLLM visual space, guiding each slot to bind to a coherent entity, and (iii) an Entity-to-eVidence gating mechanism that leverages the captured entities as evidence, steering the model to localize moments containing query-relevant entities. Together, these components enable VTG fine-tuning to rely on entity-grounded evidence rather than brittle dataset shortcuts. Experiments on cross-domain VTG benchmarks show that EVIDENT consistently improves out-of-domain robustness while preserving competitive in-domain performance with modest parameter overhead. These results suggest that entity-level grounding is an effective inductive bias for generalizable temporal localization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EVIDENT框架，通过将视频时序定位的微调锚定在预训练MLLMs固有的实体注意力机制上，利用实体瓶颈适配器、实体绑定蒸馏损失和实体到证据门控机制，有效缓解了跨域泛化下降问题，在保持域内性能的同时显著提升了域外鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 微调多模态大语言模型进行视频时序定位时，模型在域内性能提升的同时，在域外场景下性能急剧下降。现有研究多归因于未见查询概念，但本文发现视觉域偏移才是根本原因——它阻碍了模型将已习得的时序定位知识与固有的实体注意力能力进行耦合。
AI.method: EVIDENT包含三个核心组件：一是实体瓶颈适配器，将密集视觉令牌压缩为紧凑的实体级槽位；二是实体绑定蒸馏损失，将对象性先验注入语义无结构的MLLM视觉空间，引导每个槽位绑定到一致的实体上；三是实体到证据门控机制，利用捕获的实体作为证据，引导模型定位包含查询相关实体的时刻。三者协同使VTG微调基于实体证据而非脆弱的数据集捷径。
AI.result: 在跨域VTG基准上的实验表明，EVIDENT在保持有竞争力的域内性能的同时，持续提升了域外鲁棒性，且参数开销适中。具体而言，该方法通过实体级定位这一归纳偏置有效实现了可泛化的时序定位。
AI.conclusion: 实体级定位是一种有效的归纳偏置，能够提升MLLMs在视频时序定位任务中的跨域泛化能力。该工作表明，将时序定位微调锚定于预训练模型固有的实体注意力机制，而非依赖数据集特有的表面关联，是提升模型鲁棒性和泛化性的可行方向。
